Production: SCSS + MERN, and the\\n * extraction call moves server-side so the API stays behind your backend.\\n */\\n\\nconst C = {\\n  bg: \\\"#14110F\\\", panel: \\\"#1F1A17\\\", border: \\\"#2E2825\\\",\\n  text: \\\"#EDE6DD\\\", muted: \\\"#8A7E73\\\", R: \\\"#E8A33D\\\", L: \\\"#4FB0A5\\\",\\n};\\n\\nconst sanitize = (s) => s.toUpperCase().replace(/[^RL]/g, \\\"\\\");\\n\\nexport default function ExerciseAdminAI() {\\n  const [imageData, setImageData] = useState(null); // full data URL for preview\\n  const [imageB64, setImageB64] = useState(null);    // base64 payload\\n  const [mediaType, setMediaType] = useState(\\\"image/png\\\");\\n  const [source, setSource] = useState(\\\"Single Beat Combinations \\u00b7 p.5\\\");\\n  const [defaults, setDefaults] = useState({ notesPerBeat: 4, repeatCount: 20, difficulty: 1 });\\n  const [exercises, setExercises] = useState([]); // {id, name, pattern(string)}\\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);\\n  const [status, setStatus] = useState(\\\"\\\");\\n  const [importText, setImportText] = useState(\\\"\\\");\\n\\n  const onFile = (e) => {\\n    const file = e.target.files?.[0];\\n    if (!file) return;\\n    setMediaType(file.type || \\\"image/png\\\");\\n    const r = new FileReader();\\n    r.onload = () => {\\n      setImageData(r.result);\\n      setImageB64(String(r.result).split(\\\",\\\")[1]);\\n      setStatus(\\\"\\\");\\n    };\\n    r.readAsDataURL(file);\\n  };\\n\\n  // ---- the magic: read the page with Claude vision ----\\n  const extract = async () => {\\n    if (!imageB64) { setStatus(\\\"Upload a page image first.\\\"); return; }\\n    setLoading(true);\\n    setStatus(\\\"Reading the page\\u2026\\\");\\n    try {\\n      const res = await fetch(\\\"https://api.anthropic.com/v1/messages\\\", {\\n        method: \\\"POST\\\",\\n        headers: { \\\"Content-Type\\\": \\\"application/json\\\" },\\n        body: JSON.stringify({\\n          model: \\\"claude-sonnet-4-6\\\",\\n          max_tokens: 1000,\\n          system:\\n            \\\"You read snare-drum practice pages. Under each numbered exercise are printed sticking letters R (right) and L (left). \\\" +\\n            \\\"Return ONLY a compact JSON array, no markdown, no commentary. \\\" +\\n            'Each item: {\\\"name\\\":string,\\\"pattern\\\":string}. ' +\\n            '\\\"pattern\\\" is the full run of R/L letters printed for that exercise\\\\'s written measure, uppercase, no spaces (e.g. \\\"RLRRLRLL\\\"). ' +\\n            \\\"Include every numbered exercise, in order: top-to-bottom in the left column, then the right column. Output JSON only.\\\",\\n          messages: [\\n            {\\n              role: \\\"user\\\",\\n              content: [\\n                { type: \\\"image\\\", source: { type: \\\"base64\\\", media_type: mediaType, data: imageB64 } },\\n                { type: \\\"text\\\", text: \\\"Extract all exercises from this page as JSON.\\\" },\\n              ],\\n            },\\n          ],\\n        }),\\n      });\\n      const data = await res.json();\\n      const text = (data.content || [])\\n        .filter((b) => b.type === \\\"text\\\").map((b) => b.text).join(\\\"\\\\n\\\")\\n        .replace(/```json|```/g, \\\"\\\").trim();\\n      const parsed = JSON.parse(text);\\n      if (!Array.isArray(parsed)) throw new Error(\\\"not an array\\\");\\n      setExercises(\\n        parsed.map((p, i) => ({\\n          id: `ex-${Date.now()}-${i}`,\\n          name: p.name || `Exercise ${i + 1}`,\\n          pattern: sanitize(String(p.pattern || \\\"\\\")),\\n        }))\\n      );\\n      setStatus(`Read ${parsed.length} exercises. Check them against the page and fix any misreads.`);\\n    } catch (err) {\\n      setStatus(\\\"Couldn't read that automatically \\u2014 try a sharper/cropped image, or add lines manually below.\\\");\\n    } finally {\\n      setLoading(false);\\n    }\\n  };\\n\\n  // ---- edit ops ----\\n  const update = (id, key, val) => setExercises((xs) => xs.map((x) => (x.id === id ? { ...x, [key]: key === \\\"pattern\\\" ? sanitize(val) : val } : x)));\\n  const del = (id) => setExercises((xs) => xs.filter((x) => x.id !== id));\\n  const move = (id, dir) => setExercises((xs) => {\\n    const i = xs.findIndex((x) => x.id === id); const j = i + dir;\\n    if (j < 0 || j >= xs.length) return xs;\\n    const n = [...xs]; [n[i], n[j]] = [n[j], n[i]]; return n;\\n  });\\n  const addBlank = () => setExercises((xs) => [...xs, { id: `ex-${Date.now()}`, name: `Exercise ${xs.length + 1}`, pattern: \\\"\\\" }]);\\n\\n  // ---- export shape (matches the trainer) ----\\n  const json = useMemo(() => JSON.stringify(\\n    exercises.map((x, i) => ({\\n      id: x.id, name: x.name, source,\\n      pattern: x.pattern.split(\\\"\\\"),\\n      notesPerBeat: defaults.notesPerBeat,\\n      repeatCount: defaults.repeatCount,\\n      difficulty: defaults.difficulty,\\n      order: i + 1,\\n    })), null, 2), [exercises, source, defaults]);\\n\\n  const copyJson = async () => {\\n    try { await navigator.clipboard.writeText(json); setStatus(\\\"JSON copied.\\\"); }\\n    catch { setStatus(\\\"Copy blocked \\u2014 select the text manually.\\\"); }\\n  };\\n  const doImport = () => {\\n    try {\\n      const arr = JSON.parse(importText);\\n      setExercises(arr.map((x, i) => ({ id: x.id || `ex-${Date.now()}-${i}`, name: x.name, pattern: Array.isArray(x.pattern) ? x.pattern.join(\\\"\\\") : sanitize(x.pattern || \\\"\\\") })));\\n      setStatus(`Imported ${arr.length} exercises.`); setImportText(\\\"\\\");\\n    } catch { setStatus(\\\"Couldn't parse that JSON.\\\"); }\\n  };\\n\\n  return (\\n    <div className=\\\"min-h-screen font-sans\\\" style={{ background: C.bg, color: C.text }}>\\n      <div className=\\\"max-w-[1100px] mx-auto px-4 py-6\\\">\\n        <div className=\\\"mb-6\\\">\\n          <div className=\\\"text-[11px] tracking-[0.3em] uppercase mb-1\\\" style={{ color: C.muted }}>Stick Control \\u00b7 Admin</div>\\n          <h1 className=\\\"text-2xl font-black tracking-tight\\\">Read a page</h1>\\n        </div>\\n\\n        <div className=\\\"grid md:grid-cols-2 gap-5\\\">\\n          {/* image + extract */}\\n          <div>\\n            <Label>Page image</Label>\\n            <div className=\\\"rounded-xl border overflow-hidden mb-3\\\" style={{ borderColor: C.border, background: C.panel }}>\\n onChange={onFile} className=\\\"hidden\\\" />\\n                </label>\\n              )}\\n            </div>\\n            {imageData && (\\n              <label className=\\\"block text-center mb-3 text-sm cursor-pointer\\\" style={{ color: C.muted }}>\\n                Replace image\\n                <input type=\\\"file\\\" accept=\\\"image/*\\\" onChange={onFile} className=\\\"hidden\\\" />\\n              </label>\\n            )}\\n            <button onClick={extract} disabled={loading || !imageB64}\\n              className=\\\"w-full py-4 rounded-xl font-black text-lg active:scale-[0.99] transition disabled:opacity-40\\\"\\n              style={{ background: C.R, color: C.bg }}>\\n              {loading ? \\\"Reading\\u2026\\\" : \\\"Read exercises from   <Field label=\\\"Notes/beat\\\">\\n                  <select value={defaults.notesPerBeat} onChange={(e) => setDefaults((d) => ({ ...d, notesPerBeat: +e.target.value }))} className=\\\"w-full That review step isn't just for accuracy; it's also your human-in-the-loop, which keeps you firmly the curator of your own data.\n\nTwo production notes for when you move to the real stack. First, in the live app you'll want this API call to happen **on your Express server**, not the browser \u2014 so your key stays server-side and you can cache results. The client just uploads the image and gets back the parsed exercises. Second, this is where saving matters: once read and corrected, exercises get written to MongoDB so you never re-read the same page twice.\n\nThat actually makes the **MERN server the natural next build**, because it's now doing real work: storing exercises, running the extraction endpoint, and holding user goals + progress.       "file_text": "import React, { useState, useMemo } from \"react\";\n\n/**\n * ExerciseAdminGrouped \u2014 reads a page into a BEAT-GROUPED, ACCENT-AWARE model.\n *\n * Why grouped: a drummer reads \"1e&a 2e&a 3e&a 4e&a\", not 16 loose notes.\n * The beat grouping drives the metronome's downbeats and the on-screen layout.\n * Accents (>) are first-class because on the accent-study pages they ARE the\n * exercise.\n *\n * Export shape the trainer reads:\n *   {\n *     id, name, source, timeSignature:[4,4], notesPerBeat,\n *     beats: [ [{h:\"R\",accent:false}, ...], ... ],   // one array per beat\n *     repeatCount, difficulty, order\n *   }\n */\n\nconst C = {\n  bg: \"#14110F\", panel: \"#1F1A17\", border: \"#2E2825\",\n  text: \"#EDE6DD\", muted: \"#8A7E73\", R: \"#E8A33D\", L: \"#4FB0A5\", accent: \"#EDE6DD\",\n};\n\nconst sanitize = (s) => String(s).toUpperCase().replace(/[^RL]/g, \"\");\nconst flatLen = (beats) => beats.reduce((n, b) => n + b.length, 0);\n\nexport default function ExerciseAdminGrouped() {\n  const [imageData, setImageData] = useState(null);\n  const [imageB64, setImageB64] = useState(null);\n  const [mediaType, setMediaType] = useState(\"image/png\");\n  const [source, setSource] = useState(\"Single Beat Combinations \u00b7 p.5\");\n  const [defaults, setDefaults] = useState({ repeatCount: 20, difficulty: 1 });\n  const [exercises, setExercises] = useState([]); // {id,name,beats:[str],accents:bool[]}\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);\n  const [status, setStatus] = useState(\"\");\n  const [importText, setImportText] = useState(\"\");\n\n  const onFile = (e) => {\n    const file = e.target.files?.[0];\n    if (!file) return;\n    setMediaType(file.type || \"image/png\");\n    const r = new FileReader();\n    r.onload = () => { setImageData(r.result); setImageB64(String(r.result).split(\",\")[1]); setStatus(\"\"); };\n    r.readAsDataURL(file);\n  };\n\n  const buildAccents = (beats, indices = []) => {\n    const flags = new Array(flatLen(beats)).fill(false);\n    indices.forEach((i) => { if (i >= 0 && i < flags.length) flags[i] = true; });\n    return flags;\n  };\n\n  const extract = async () => {\n    if (!imageB64) { setStatus(\"Upload a page image first.\"); return; }\n    setLoading(true); setStatus(\"Reading the page\u2026\");\n    try {\n      const res = await fetch(\"https://api.anthropic.com/v1/messages\", {\n        method: \"POST\",\n        headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n        body: JSON.stringify({\n          model: \"claude-sonnet-4-6\",\n          max_tokens: 1000,\n          system:\n            \"You read snare-drum practice pages. Under each numbered exercise are printed sticking letters R (right) and L (left), beamed into beats (usually 4 sixteenth notes per beat in 4/4). Some notes carry an accent (>). \" +\n            \"Return ONLY a compact JSON array, no markdown, no prose. \" +\n            'Each item: {\"name\":string,\"beats\":[string,...],\"accents\":[number,...]}. ' +\n            'Each \"beats\" element is ONE beat\\'s letters, uppercase, no spaces (e.g. \"RLRL\"). Keep one array element per beat \u2014 do NOT flatten into a single string. ' +\n            '\"accents\" holds the 0-based indices (counted across the whole measure) of accented notes; use [] if none. ' +\n            \"Read every numbered exercise in order: left column top-to-bottom, then right column. Output JSON only.\",\n          messages: [{\n            role: \"user\",\n            content: [\n              { type: \"image\", source: { type: \"base64\", media_type: mediaType, data: imageB64 } },\n              { type: \"text\", text: \"Extract all exercises, keeping the beat grouping.\" },\n            ],\n          }],\n        }),\n      });\n      const data = await res.json();\n      const text = (data.content || []).filter((b) => b.type === \"text\").map((b) => b.text).join(\"\\n\").replace(/```json|```/g, \"\").trim();\n      const parsed = JSON.parse(text);\n      if (!Array.isArray(parsed)) throw new Error();\n      setExercises(parsed.map((p, i) => {\n        const beats = (p.beats || []).map(sanitize).filter(Boolean);\n        return { id: `ex-${Date.now()}-${i}`, name: p.name || `Exercise ${i + 1}`, beats, accents: buildAccents(beats, p.accents || []) };\n      }));\n      setStatus(`Read ${parsed.length} exercises. Beats kept separate \u2014 tap a note to toggle its accent.`);\n    } catch {\n      setStatus(\"Couldn't read that automatically \u2014 try a sharper image, or add a line manually.\");\n    } finally { setLoading(false); }\n  };\n\n  // ---- edits ----\n  const setName = (id, name) => setExercises((xs) => xs.map((x) => x.id === id ? { ...x, name } : x));\n  const setBeatsText = (id, txt) => setExercises((xs) => xs.map((x) => {\n    if (x.id !== id) return x;\n    const beats = txt.split(/[\\s\\-|]+/).map(sanitize).filter(Boolean);\n    return { ...x, beats, accents: buildAccents(beats, []) }; // re-edit clears accents\n  }));\n  const toggleAccent = (id, flatIdx) => setExercises((xs) => xs.map((x) => {\n    if (x.id !== id) return x;\n    const accents = [...x.accents]; accents[flatIdx] = !accents[flatIdx]; return { ...x, accents };\n  }));\n  const del = (id) => setExercises((xs) => xs.filter((x) => x.id !== id));\n  const move = (id, dir) => setExercises((xs) => { const i = xs.findIndex((x) => x.id === id); const j = i + dir; if (j < 0 || j >= xs.length) return xs; const n = [...xs]; [n[i], n[j]] = [n[j], n[i]]; return n; });\n  const addBlank = () => setExercises((xs) => [...xs, { id: `ex-${Date.now()}`, name: `Exercise ${xs.length + 1}`, beats: [], accents: [] }]);\n\n  const json = useMemo(() => JSON.stringify(exercises.map((x, i) => {\n    let idx = 0;\n    const beats = x.beats.map((b) => b.split(\"\").map((h) => ({ h, accent: !!x.accents[idx++] })));\n    return { id: x.id, name: x.name, source, timeSignature: [4, 4], notesPerBeat: x.beats[0]?.length || 4, beats, repeatCount: defaults.repeatCount, difficulty: defaults.difficulty, order: i + 1 };\n  }), null, 2), [exercises, source, defaults]);\n\n  const copyJson = async () => { try { await navigator.clipboard.writeText(json); setStatus(\"JSON copied.\"); } catch { setStatus(\"Copy blocked \u2014 select manually.\"); } };\n  const doImport = () => {\n    try {\n      const arr = JSON.parse(importText);\n      setExercises(arr.map((x, i) => {\n        const beats = (x.beats || []).map((b) => Array.isArray(b) ? b.map((n) => n.h).join(\"\") : sanitize(b));\n        const accents = []; let idx = 0;\n        (x.beats || []).forEach((b) => (Array.isArray(b) ? b : []).forEach((n) => { accents[idx++] = !!n.accent; }));\n        return { id: x.id || `ex-${Date.now()}-${i}`, name: x.name, beats, accents };\n      }));\n      setStatus(`Imported ${arr.length} exercises.`); setImportText(\"\");\n    } catch { setStatus(\"Couldn't parse that JSON.\"); }\n  };\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"min-h-screen font-sans\" style={{ background: C.bg, color: C.text }}>\n      <div className=\"max-w-[1100px] mx-auto px-4 py-6\">\n        <div className=\"mb-6\">\n          <div className=\"text-[11px] tracking-[0.3em] uppercase mb-1\" style={{ color: C.muted }}>Stick Control \u00b7 Admin</div>\n          <h1 className=\"text-2xl font-black tracking-tight\">Read a page</h1>\n        </div>\n\n        <div className=\"grid md:grid-cols-2 gap-5\">\n          <div>\n            <Label>Page image</Label>\n            <div className=\"rounded-xl border overflow-hidden mb-3\" style={{ borderColor: C.border, background: C.panel }}>\n              {imageData ? <img src={imageData} alt=\"page\" className=\"w-full block\" /> : (\n                <label className=\"flex flex-col items-center justify-center h-56 cursor-pointer text-center px-6\">\n                  <div className=\"text-4xl mb-2\" style={{ color: C.muted }}>+</div>\n                  <div className=\"font-semibold mb-1\">Upload your page scan</div>\n                  <div className=\"text-sm\" style={{ color: C.muted }}>The app reads the stickings for you.</div>\n                  <input type=\"file\" accept=\"image/*\" onChange={onFile} className=\"hidden\" />\n                </label>\n              )}\n            </div>\n            {imageData && <label className=\"block text-center mb-3 text-sm cursor-pointer\" style={{ color: C.muted }}>Replace image<input type=\"file\" accept=\"image/*\" onChange={onFile} className=\"hidden\" /></label>}\n            <button onClick={extract} disabled={loading || !imageB64} className=\"w-full py-4 rounded-xl font-black text-lg active:scale-[0.99] transition disabled:opacity-40\" style={{ background: C.R, color: C.bg }}>\n              {loading ? \"Reading\u2026\" : \"Read exercises from image\"}\n            </button>\n            {status && <div className=\"text-sm mt-3\" style={{ color: C.R }}>{status}</div>}\n          </div>\n\n          <div>\n            <Label>Defaults for this page</Label>\n            <div className=\"rounded-xl border p-4 space-y-3\" style={{ borderColor: C.border, background: C.panel }}>\n              <Field label=\"Source / page\"><input value={source} onChange={(e) => setSource(e.target.value)} className=\"w-full rounded-lg px-3 py-2 text-sm outline-none\" style={{ background: C.bg, border: `1px solid ${C.border}`, color: C.text }} /></Field>\n              <div className=\"grid grid-cols-2 gap-3\">\n                <Field label=\"Repeats\"><input type=\"number\" min={1} value={defaults.repeatCount} onChange={(e) => setDefaults((d) => ({ ...d, repeatCount: +e.target.value }))} className=\"w-full rounded-lg px-2 py-2 text-sm outline-none\" style={{ background: C.bg, border: `1px solid ${C.border}`, color: C.text }} /></Field>\n                <Field label=\"Difficulty\"><select value={defaults.difficulty} onChange={(e) => setDefaults((d) => ({ ...d, difficulty: +e.target.value }))} className=\"w-full rounded-lg px-2 py-2 text-sm outline-none\" style={{ background: C.bg, border: `1px solid ${C.border}`, color: C.text }}>{[1, 2, 3, 4, 5].map((d) => <option key={d} value={d}>{d}</option>)}</select></Field>\n              </div>\n              <p className=\"text-xs leading-relaxed\" style={{ color: C.muted }}>Each beat shows as its own group below. Accents (&gt;) are tap-to-toggle \u2014 page 5 has none, the accent pages will.</p>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        <div className=\"mt-8 flex items-center justify-between\">\n          <Label>Review \u2014 beats stay grouped</Label>\n          <button onClick={addBlank} className=\"text-sm px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg\" style={{ background: C.panel, border: `1px solid ${C.border}`, color: C.text }}>+ Add line</button>\n        </div>\n\n        {exercises.length === 0 ? // {id,name,beats:[str],accents:bool[]}\\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);\\n  const [status, setStatus] = useState(\\\"\\\");\\n  const [importText, setImportText] = useState(\\\"\\\");\\n\\n  const onFile = (e) => {\\n    const file = e.target.files?.[0];\\n    if (!file) return;\\n    setMediaType(file.type || \\\"image/png\\\");\\n    const r = new FileReader();\\n    r.onload = () => { setImageData(r.result); setImageB64(String(r.result).split(\\\",\\\")[1]); setStatus(\\\"\\\"); };\\n    r.readAsDataURL(file);\\n  };\\n\\n  const buildAccents = (beats, indices = []) => {\\n    const flags = new Array(flatLen(beats)).fill(false);\\n    indices.forEach((i) => { if (i >= 0 && i < flags.length) flags[i] = true; });\\n    return flags;\\n  };\\n\\n  const extract = async () => {\\n    if (!imageB64) { setStatus(\\\"Upload a page image first.\\\"); return; }\\n    setLoading(true); setStatus(\\\"Reading the page\\u2026\\\");\\n    try {\\n      const res = await fetch(\\\"https://api.anthropic.com/v1/messages\\\", {\\n        method: \\\"POST\\\",\\n        headers: { \\\"Content-Type\\\": \\\"application/json\\\" },\\n        body: JSON.stringify({\\n          model: \\\"claude-sonnet-4-6\\\",\\n          max_tokens: 1000,\\n          system:\\n            \\\"You read snare-drum practice pages. Under each numbered exercise are printed sticking letters R (right) and L (left), beamed into beats (usually 4 sixteenth notes per beat in 4/4). Some notes carry an accent (>). \\\" +\\n            \\\"Return ONLY a compact JSON array, no markdown, no prose. \\\" +\\n            'Each item: {\\\"name\\\":string,\\\"beats\\\":[string,...],\\\"accents\\\":[number,...]}. ' +\\n            'Each \\\"beats\\\" element is ONE beat\\\\'s letters, uppercase, no spaces (e.g. \\\"RLRL\\\"). Keep one array element per beat \\u2014 do NOT flatten into a single string. Beats kept separate \\u2014 tap a note to toggle its accent.`);\\n    } catch {\\n      setStatus(\\\"Couldn't read that automatically \\u2014 try a sharper image, or add a line manually.\\\");\\n    } finally { setLoading(false); }\\n  };\\n\\n  // ---- edits ----\\n  const setName = (id, name) => setExercises((xs) => xs.map((x) => x.id === id ? \">\" : \"\") + n.h + (n.art === \"buzz\" ? \"z\" : \"\")).join(\"\")).join(\"|\");\n}\n\nexport default function ExerciseAdminPro() {\n  const [imageData, setImageData] = useState(null);\n  const [imageB64, setImageB64] = useState(null);\n  const [mediaType, setMediaType] = useState(\"image/png\");\n  const [source, setSource] = useState(\"Short Rolls and Triplets \u00b7 p.14\");\n  const [defaults, setDefaults] = useState({ repeatCount: 20, difficulty: 3 });\n  const [exercises, setExercises] = useState([]); // {id,name,beats}\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);\n  const [status, setStatus] = useState(\"\");\n  const [importText, setImportText] = useState(\"\");\n\n  const onFile = (e) => {\n    const file = e.target.files?.[0]; if (!file) return;\n    setMediaType(file.type || \"image/png\");\n    const r = new FileReader();\n    r.onload = () => { setImageData(r.result); setImageB64(String(r.result).split(\",\")[1]); setStatus(\"\"); };\n    r.readAsDataURL(file);\n  };\n\n  const extract = async () => {\n    if (!imageB64) { setStatus(\"Upload a page image first.\"); return; }\n    setLoading(true); setStatus(\"Reading the page\u2026\");\n    try {\n      const res = await fetch(\"https://api.anthropic.com/v1/messages\", {\n        method: \"POST\", headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n        body: JSON.stringify({\n          model: \"claude-sonnet-4-6\", max_tokens: 1000,\n          system:\n            \"You read snare-drum practice pages and output a compact transcription. \" +\n            \"Under each numbered exercise are printed sticking letters R (right) / L (left). ' +\n            \"Read every numbered exercise in order: left column top-to-bottom, then right column. Keep beats separate and mark triplets, accents, and buzz rolls.\" },\n          ] }],\n        }),\n      });\n      const data = await res.json();\n      const text = (data.content || []).filter((b) => b.type === \"text\").map((b) => b.text).join(\"\\n\").replace(/```json|```/g, \"\").trim();\n      const parsed = JSON.parse(text);\n      if (!Array.isArray(parsed)) throw new Error();\n      setExercises(parsed.map((p, i) => ({ id: `ex-${Date.now()}-${i}`, name: p.name || `Exercise ${i + 1}`, beats: parsePattern(String(p.p || \"\")) })));\n      setStatus(`Read ${parsed.length} exercises. Click a note to cycle plain \u2192 accent \u2192 buzz.`);\n    } catch {\n      setStatus(\"Couldn't read that automatically \u2014 try a sharper image, or edit a line manually.\");\n    } finally { xs.map((x) => x.id === id ? { ...x, beats: parsePattern(txt) } : x));\n  const cycle = (id, bi, ni) => setExercises((xs) => xs.map((x) => {\n    if (x.id !== id) return x;\n    const beats = n[j]] = [n[j], n[i]]; return n; });\n  const addBlank = () => setExercises((xs) => [...xs, { id: `ex-${Date.now()}`, name: `Exercise ${xs.length + 1}`, beats: [] }]);\n\n  const json = useMemo(() => \\\">\\\" : \\\"\\\") + n.h + (n.art === \\\"buzz\\\" ? \\\"z\\\" : \\\"\\\")).join(\\\"\\\")).join(\\\"|\\\");\\n}\\n\\nexport default function ExerciseAdminPro() {\\n  const [imageData, setImageData] = useState(null);\\n  const [imageB64, setImageB64] = useState(null);\\n  const [mediaType, setMediaType] = useState(\\\"image/png\\\");\\n  const [source, setSource] = useState(\\\"Short Rolls and Triplets \\u00b7 p.14\\\");\\n  const [defaults, setDefaults] = useState({ repeatCount: 20, difficulty: 3 });\\n  const [exercises, setExercises] = useState([]); // {id,name,beats}\\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);\\n  const [status, setStatus] = useState(\\\"\\\");\\n  const [importText, setImportText] = useState(\\\"\\\");\\n\\n  const onFile = (e) => {\\n    const file = e.target.files?.[0]; if (!file) return;\\n    setMediaType(file.type || \\\"image/png\\\");\\n    const r = new FileReader();\\n    r.onload = () => { setImageData(r.result); setImageB64(String(r.result).split(\\\",\\\")[1]); setStatus(\\\"\\\"); };\\n    r.readAsDataURL(file);\\n  };\\n\\n  const extract = async () => {\\n    if (!imageB64) { setStatus(\\\"Upload a page image first.\\\"); return; }\\n    setLoading(true); setStatus(\\\"Reading the page\\u2026\\\");\\n    try {\\n      const res = await fetch(\\\"https://api.anthropic.com/v1/messages\\\", {\\n        method: \\\"POST\\\", headers: { \\\"Content-Type\\\": \\\"application/json\\\" },\\n        body: JSON.stringify({\\n          model: \\\"claude-sonnet-4-6\\\", max_tokens: 1000,\\n          system:\\n            \\\"You read snare-drum practice pages and output a compact transcription. \\\" +\\n            \\\"Under each numbered exercise are printed sticking letters R (right) / L (left). Notes are beamed into beats. A beat of 16th notes has 4 notes; a beat marked with a small '3' (triplet) has 3 notes. Some notes have an accent (>). A slashed stem / tremolo mark is a buzz (multiple-bounce) roll. \\\" +\\n            \\\"Return ONLY a JSON array, no markdown, no prose. \\\" +\\n            'Each item: {\\\"name\\\":string,\\\"p\\\":string}. ' +\\n            '\\\"p\\\" encodes the measure: beats separated by \\\"|\\\". Within a beat, write one token per note, no spaces. ' +\\n            \\\"Read every numbered exercise in order: left column top-to-bottom, then right column. The edit field uses the compact `RLRL|RLRL|RLR|LRL` form so fixing a misread beat is one keystroke.\n\nThe reason this is the model for the *whole* book and not a page-14 patch:\n\nThe metronome will derive its timing per beat: a beat lasts `60/tempo` seconds, and the notes inside it are spaced `beatDuration / subdivision`. So beats 1\u20132 place 4 evenly, beats 3\u20134 place 3 evenly \u2014 and that ratio *is* the triplet feel (\"1 e & a \u2026 3-trip-let\"). A single exercise-wide subdivision could never produce that. Buzz notes ride the same grid; the `art:\"buzz\"` flag just tells the trainer to show the buzz cue and (optionally) play a different click \u2014 the drummer executes the multiple bounce, the metronome only keeps time. And when you eventually scan a flam or drag page, those are grace notes \u2014 a new `art` value plus a grace field, slotting into the exact same structure. Nothing else has to change.\n\nSo to directly answer \"does it know how to deal with more complex\": the model now covers single strokes, double strokes (free \u2014 it's just the sticking), mixed 16th/triplet subdivisions, accents, and buzz rolls, with flams/drags as a drop-in extension.\n\nThe catch, same as last time: the **trainer prototype can't play any of this yet** \u2014 it still assumes a flat one-beat cell at a fixed subdivision. To actually hear page 14, the trainer's metronome needs the per-beat spacing and the buzz/accent cues. That's the natural next build, and it's the one that turns this into a real instrument: read a page \u2192 export \u2192 practice triplets-and-all against a click.\n\nWant me to rebuild the trainer on this model so it plays mixed subdivisions with accented downbeats and buzz cues?       "file_text": "import React, { useState, useRef, useEffect, useCallback } from \"react\";\n\n/**\n * ImageEnhancer \u2014 cleans a page photo before the vision read.\n *\n * Pure Canvas, no dependencies. Pipeline:\n *   grayscale -> brightness/contrast -> unsharp mask -> adaptive threshold\n *\n * What it fixes well: low contrast, uneven lighting, mild softness.\n * What it can't fix: genuine out-of-focus blur (lost detail) \u2014 retake instead.\n *\n * INTEGRATION: in the admin, run this on upload, then feed the processed\n * canvas to the vision call:\n *   const b64 = canvas.toDataURL(\"image/png\").split(\",\")[1];\n *   // ...send b64 as the image source to /v1/messages\n */\n\nconst C = { bg: \"#14110F\", panel: \"#1F1A17\", border: \"#2E2825\", text: \"#EDE6DD\", muted: \"#8A7E73\", R: \"#E8A33D\", L: \"#4FB0A5\" };\nconst MAX_W = 1000;\nconst clamp = (v) => (v < 0 ? 0 : v > 255 ? 255 : v);\n\nconst PRESETS = {\n  auto:   { grayscale: true, brightness: 0, contrast: 45, sharpen: 1.2, sharpenR: 1.2, threshold: true, threshC: 12, threshR: 14 },\n  soft:   { grayscale: true, brightness: 5, contrast: 30, sharpen: 1.8, sharpenR: 1.5, threshold: false, threshC: 12, threshR: 14 },\n  none:   { grayscale: false, brightness: 0, contrast: 0, sharpen: 0, sharpenR: 1, threshold: false, threshC: 10, threshR: 12 },\n};\n\nexport default function ImageEnhancer() {\n  const [imgEl, setImgEl] = useState(null);\n  const [origUrl, setOrigUrl] = useState(null);\n  const [opts, setOpts] = useState(PRESETS.auto);\n  const [status, setStatus] = useState(\"\");\n  const canvasRef = useRef(null);\n\n  const onFile = (e) => {\n    const file = e.target.files?.[0]; if (!file) return;\n    const url = URL.createObjectURL(file);\n    setOrigUrl(url);\n    const img = new Image();\n    img.onload = () => { setImgEl(img); setStatus(\"\"); };\n    img.src = url;\n  };\n\n  const set = (k, v) => setOpts((o) => ({ ...o, [k]: v }));\n\n  const process = useCallback(() => {\n    const img = imgEl, canvas = canvasRef.current;\n    if (!img || !canvas) return;\n    const scale = Math.min(1, MAX_W / img.naturalWidth);\n    const w = Math.round(img.naturalWidth * scale), h = Math.round(img.naturalHeight * scale);\n    canvas.width = w; canvas.height = h;\n    const ctx = canvas.getContext(\"2d\", { willReadFrequently: true });\n    ctx.filter = \"none\";\n    ctx.drawImage(img, 0, 0, w, h);\n\n    // 1) grayscale + brightness/contrast\n    const cf = (259 * (opts.contrast + 255)) / (255 * (259 - opts.contrast));\n    let id = ctx.getImageData(0, 0, w, h); let d = id.data;\n    for (let i = 0; i < d.length; i += 4) {\n      let r = d[i], g = d[i + 1], b = d[i + 2];\n      if (opts.grayscale) { const v = 0.299 * r + 0.587 * g + 0.114 * b; r = g = b = v; }\n      d[i] = clamp(cf * (r - 128) + 128 + opts.brightness);\n      d[i + 1] = clamp(cf * (g - 128) + 128 + opts.brightness);\n      d[i + 2] = clamp(cf * (b - 128) + 128 + opts.brightness);\n    }\n    ctx.putImageData(id, 0, 0);\n\n    // 2) unsharp mask: out = px + amount*(px - blurred)\n    if (opts.sharpen > 0) {\n      const t = document.createElement(\"canvas\"); t.width = w; t.height = h;\n      const tc = t.getContext(\"2d\"); tc.filter = `blur(${opts.sharpenR}px)`; tc.drawImage(canvas, 0, 0);\n      const blur = tc.getImageData(0, 0, w, h).data;\n      const cur = ctx.getImageData(0, 0, w, h); const cd = cur.data; const a = opts.sharpen;\n      for (let i = 0; i < cd.length; i += 4) {\n        cd[i] = clamp(cd[i] + a * (cd[i] - blur[i]));\n        cd[i + 1] = clamp(cd[i + 1] + a * (cd[i + 1] - blur[i + 1]));\n        cd[i + 2] = clamp(cd[i + 2] + a * (cd[i + 2] - blur[i + 2]));\n      }\n      ctx.putImageData(cur, 0, 0);\n    }\n\n    // 3) adaptive threshold (local mean via blur) \u2014 great for uneven lighting\n    if (opts.threshold) {\n      const t = document.createElement(\"canvas\"); t.width = w; t.height = h;\n      const tc = t.getContext(\"2d\"); tc.filter = `blur(${opts.threshR}px)`; tc.drawImage(canvas, 0, 0);\n      const mean = tc.getImageData(0, 0, w, h).data;\n      const cur = ctx.getImageData(0, 0, w, h); const cd = cur.data;\n      for (let i = 0; i < cd.length; i += 4) {\n        const gray = 0.299 * cd[i] + 0.587 * cd[i + 1] + 0.114 * cd[i + 2];\n        const m = 0.299 * mean[i] + 0.587 * mean[i + 1] + 0.114 * mean[i + 2];\n        const val = gray > m - opts.threshC ? 255 : 0;\n        cd[i] = cd[i + 1] = cd[i + 2] = val;\n      }\n      ctx.putImageData(cur, 0, 0);\n    }\n  }, [imgEl, opts]);\n\n  useEffect(() => { process(); }, [process]);\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"min-h-screen font-sans\" style={{ background: C.bg, color: C.text }}>\n      <div className=\"max-w-[1100px] mx-auto px-4 py-6\">\n        <div className=\"mb-6\">\n          <div className=\"text-[11px] tracking-[0.3em] uppercase mb-1\" style={{ color: C.muted }}>Stick Control \u00b7 Admin</div>\n          <h1 className=\"text-2xl font-black tracking-tight\">Clean up a page photo</h1>\n        </div>\n\n        {!imgEl ? (\n          <label className=\"flex flex-col items-center justify-center h-64 rounded-xl border cursor-pointer text-center px-6\" style={{ borderColor: C.border, background: C.panel }}>\n            <div className=\"text-4xl mb-2\" style={{ color: C.muted }}>+</div>\n            <div className=\"font-semibold mb-1\">Upload a page photo</div>\n            <div className=\"text-sm\" style={{ color: C.muted }}>We'll sharpen and clean it for reading.</div>\n            <input type=\"file\" accept=\"image/*\" onChange={onFile} className=\"hidden\" />\n          </label>\n        ) : (\n          <>\n            {/* presets */}\n            <div className=\"flex gap-2 mb-4\">\n              {[[\"auto\", \"Auto (book scan)\"], [\"soft\", \"Sharpen only\"], [\"none\", \"Original\"]].map(([k, label]) => (\n                <button key={k} onClick={() => setOpts(PRESETS[k])} className=\"px-3 py-2 rounded-lg text-sm font-semibold active:scale-95 transition\"\n                  style={{ background: C.panel, border: `1px solid ${C.border}`, color: C.text }}>{label}</button>\n              ))}\n              <label className=\"px-3 py-2 rounded-lg text-sm font-semibold cursor-pointer ml-auto\" style={{ background: C.panel, border: `1px solid ${C.border}`, color: C.muted }}>\n                Replace<input type=\"file\" accept=\"image/*\" onChange={onFile} className=\"hidden\" />\n              </label>\n            </div>\n\n            {/* before / after */}\n            <div className=\"grid md:grid-cols-2 gap-4 mb-5\">\n              <Frame label=\"Before\">\n                <img src={origUrl} alt=\"original\" className=\"w-full block\" />\n              </Frame>\n              <Frame label=\"After \u2014 sent to the reader\">\n                <canvas ref={canvasRef} className=\"w-full block\" />\n              </Frame>\n            </div>\n\n            {/* controls */}\n            <div className=\"rounded-xl border p-4 grid sm:grid-cols-2 gap-x-6 gap-y-4\" style={{ borderColor: C.border, background: C.panel }}>\n              <Toggle label=\"Grayscale\" on={opts.grayscale} onChange={(v) => set(\"grayscale\", v)} />\n              <Toggle label=\"Black & white threshold\" on={opts.threshold} onChange={(v) => set(\"threshold\", v)} />\n              <Slider label=\"Contrast\" min={0} max={120} value={opts.contrast} onChange={(v) => set(\"contrast\", v)} />\n              <Slider label=\"Brightness\" min={-60} max={60} value={opts.brightness} onChange={(v) => set(\"brightness\", v)} />\n              <Slider label=\"Sharpen\" min={0} max={3} step={0.1} value={opts.sharpen} onChange={(v) => set(\"sharpen\", v)} />\n              {opts.threshold && <Slider label=\"Threshold bias\" min={0} max={30} value={opts.threshC} onChange={(v) => set(\"threshC\", v)} />}\n            </div>\n\n            <button onClick={() => setStatus(\"Ready \u2014 this cleaned image is what the reader receives.\")}\n              className=\"mt-4 w-full className=\"text-sm mt-3\" style={{ color: C.L }}>{status}</div>}\n          </>\n        )}\n      </div>\n    </div>\n  );\n}\n\nfunction Frame({ label, children }) {\n  return (\n    <div>\n      <div className=\"text-[11px] tracking-[0.25em] uppercase mb-2\" style={{ color: C.muted }}>{label}</div>\n      <div className=\"rounded-xl border overflow-hidden\" style={{ borderColor: C.border, background: \"#fff\" }}>{children}</div>\n    </div>\n  );\n}\nfunction Slider({ label, value, onChange, min, max, step = 1 }) {\n  return (\n    <div>\n      <div className=\"flex justify-between text-xs mb-1.5\" style={{ color: C.muted }}><span className=\"uppercase tracking-wider\">{label}</span><span className=\"font-mono\">{value}</span></div>\n      <input type=\"range\" min={min} max={max} step={step} value={value} onChange={(e) => onChange(+e.target.value)} className=\"w-full\" style={{ accentColor: C.R }} />\n    </div>\n  );\n}\nfunction Toggle({ label, on, onChange }) {\n const cd = cur.data;\\n      for (let i = 0; i < cd.length; i += 4) {\\n        const gray = 0.299 * cd[i] + 0.587 * cd[i + 1] + 0.114 * cd[i + 2];\\n        const m = 0.299 * mean[i] + 0.587 * mean[i + 1] + 0.114 * mean[i + 2];\\n        const val = gray > m - opts.threshC ? 255 : 0;\\n        cd[i] = cd[i + 1] = cd[i + 2] = val;\\n      }\\n      ctx.putImageData(cur, 0, 0);\\n    }\\n  }, [imgEl, opts]);\\n\\n  useEffect(() => { process(); }, [process]);\\n\\n  return (\\n    <div className=\\\"min-h-screen font-sans\\\" style={{ background: C.bg, color: C.text }}>\\n      <div className=\\\"max-w-[1100px] mx-auto px-4 py-6\\\">\\n        <div className=\\\"mb-6\\\">\\n          <div className=\\\"text-[11px] tracking-[0.3em] uppercase mb-1\\\" style={{ color: C.muted }}>Stick Control \\u00b7 Admin</div>\\n          <h1 className=\\\"text-2xl font-black tracking-tight\\\">Clean up a page photo</h1>\\n        </div>\\n\\n        {!imgEl ?      <div className=\\\"text-4xl mb-2\\\" style={{ color: C.muted }}>+</div>\\n            <div className=\\\"font-semibold mb-1\\\">Upload a page photo</div>\\n            <div For heavier cases \u2014 skewed or perspective-distorted photos \u2014 the in-browser pipeline can't straighten geometry; that's where you'd reach for OpenCV.js (deskew, perspective warp) or, better, do it **server-side** with `sharp` or ImageMagick, which is faster and keeps the work off the phone. And the cheapest win of all isn't code: cropping to just the exercise grid before reading both sharpens the model's focus and cuts tokens, and if a shot is genuinely out of focus, a retake beats any filter. In practice, auto-enhance plus a tight crop is enough for the vision read to nail it.\n\nFrom here, two directions:\n\nI can **fold this enhancer into the admin's upload step** so the cleanup happens automatically before extraction (the whole read pipeline in one screen), or go build the **trainer on the new grouped/subdivision/buzz model** so you can finally practice page 14 against a proper click. [...seg.matchAll(/(>?)([RL])(z?)/gi)].map((m) => ({ h: m[2].toUpperCase(), accent: m[1] === \">\", art: m[3].toLowerCase() === \"z\" ? \"buzz\" : \"tap\" }));\n    return { subdivision: notes.length, \"\")).join(\"\")).join(\"|\");\n\nexport default function ExerciseStudio() {\n  // image + enhancement\n  const [origUrl, setOrigUrl] = useState(null);\n  const [originalB64, setOriginalB64] = useState(null);\n  const [mediaType, setMediaType] = useState(\"image/png\");\n  const [imgEl, setImgEl] = useState(null);\n  const [enh, setEnh] = useState(ENH_PRESETS.auto);\n  const [showOriginal, setShowOriginal] = useState(false);\n  const [enhNote, setEnhNote] = useState(\"\");\n  const canvasRef = useRef(null);\n\n  // authoring\n  const [source, setSource] = useState(\"Short Rolls and Triplets \u00b7 p.14\");\n  const [defaults, setDefaults] = useState({ repeatCount: 20, difficulty: 3 });\n  const [exercises, setExercises] = useState([]);\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);\n  const [status, setStatus] = useState(\"\");\n  const [importText, setImportText] = useState(\"\");\n\n  const onFile = (e) => {\n    const file = e.target.files?.[0]; if (!file) return;\n    setMediaType(file.type || \"image/png\");\n    const reader = new FileReader();\n    reader.onload = () => {\n      const dataUrl = String(reader.result);\n      setOrigUrl(dataUrl);\n      setOriginalB64(dataUrl.split(\",\")[1]);\n      const img = new Image();\n      img.onload = () => { setImgEl(img); setEnhNote(\"\"); };\n      img.onerror = () => setEnhNote(\"Couldn't load that image \u2014 try a JPG or PNG.\");\n      img.src = dataUrl;\n    };\n    reader.readAsDataURL(file);\n  };\n\n  // ---- enhancement pipeline (draws to canvasRef) ----\n  const process = useCallback(() => {\n    const img = imgEl, canvas = canvasRef.current;\n    if (!img || !canvas) return;\n    const scale = Math.min(1, MAX_W / img.naturalWidth);\n    const w = Math.round(img.naturalWidth * scale), h = Math.round(img.naturalHeight * scale);\n    canvas.width = w; canvas.height = h;\n    const ctx = canvas.getContext(\"2d\", { willReadFrequently: true });\n    ctx.filter = \"none\";\n    ctx.drawImage(img, 0, 0, w, h);\n    try {\n      const cf = (259 * (enh.contrast + 255)) / (255 * (259 - enh.contrast));\n      const id = ctx.getImageData(0, 0, w, h); const d = id.data;\n      for (let i = 0; i < d.length; i += 4) {\n        let r = d[i], g = d[i + 1], b = d[i + 2];\n        if (enh.grayscale) { const v = 0.299 * r + 0.587 * g + 0.114 * b; r = g = b = v; }\n        d[i] = clamp(cf * (r - 128) + 128 + enh.brightness);\n        d[i + 1] = clamp(cf * (g - 128) + 128 + enh.brightness);\n        d[i + 2] = clamp(cf * (b - 128) + 128 + enh.brightness);\n      }\n      ctx.putImageData(id, 0, 0);\n\n      if (enh.sharpen > 0) {\n        const t = document.createElement(\"canvas\"); t.width = w; t.height = h;\n        const tc = t.getContext(\"2d\"); tc.filter = `blur(${enh.sharpenR}px)`; tc.drawImage(canvas, 0, 0);\n        const blur = tc.getImageData(0, 0, w, h).data;\n        const cur = ctx.getImageData(0, 0, w, h); const cd = cur.data; const a = enh.sharpen;\n        for (let i = 0; i < cd.length; i += 4) {\n          cd[i] = clamp(cd[i] + a * (cd[i] - blur[i]));\n          cd[i + 1] = clamp(cd[i + 1] + a * (cd[i + 1] - blur[i + 1]));\n          cd[i + 2] = clamp(cd[i + 2] + a * (cd[i + 2] - blur[i + 2]));\n        }\n        ctx.putImageData(cur, 0, 0);\n      }\n\n      if (enh.threshold) {\n        const t = document.createElement(\"canvas\"); t.width = w; t.height = h;\n        const tc = t.getContext(\"2d\"); tc.filter = `blur(${enh.threshR}px)`; tc.drawImage(canvas, 0, 0);\n        const mean = tc.getImageData(0, 0, w, h).data;\n        const cur = ctx.getImageData(0, 0, w, h); const cd = cur.data;\n        for (let i = 0; i < cd.length; i += 4) {\n          const gray = 0.299 * cd[i] + 0.587 * cd[i + 1] + 0.114 * cd[i + 2];\n          const m = 0.299 * mean[i] + 0.587 * mean[i + 1] + 0.114 * mean[i + 2];\n          const val = gray > m - enh.threshC ? 255 : 0;\n          cd[i] = cd[i + 1] = cd[i + 2] = val;\n        }\n        ctx.putImageData(cur, 0, 0);\n      }\n    } catch {\n      setEnhNote(\"Preview frame blocked pixel processing \u2014 the original will be read instead. Enhancement runs fully in your app.\");\n    }\n  }, [imgEl, enh]);\n\n  useEffect(() => { process(); }, [process]);\n\n  // enhanced base64 (falls back to original if the canvas is unreadable)\n  const enhancedImage = () => {\n    const canvas = canvasRef.current;\n    if (canvas) { try { return { data: canvas.toDataURL(\"image/png\").split(\",\")[1], media: \"image/png\" }; } catch {} }\n    return { data: originalB64, media: mediaType };\n  };\n\n  // ---- vision read on the enhanced image ----\n  const extract = async () => {\n    if (!imgEl) { setStatus(\"Upload a page image first.\"); return; }\n    setLoading(true); setStatus(\"Reading the cleaned image\u2026\");\n    try {\n      const { data, media } = enhancedImage();\n      const res = await fetch(\"https://api.anthropic.com/v1/messages\", {\n        method: \"POST\", headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n        body: JSON.stringify({\n          model: \"claude-sonnet-4-6\", max_tokens: 1000,\n          system:\n            \"You read snare-drum practice pages and output a compact transcription. \" +\n            \"Under each numbered exercise are printed sticking letters R (right) / L (left), beamed into beats. A 16th-note beat has 4 notes; a beat marked with a small '3' (triplet) has 3 notes. Some notes have an accent (>). A slashed stem / tremolo mark is a buzz (multiple-bounce) roll. \" +\n            \"Return ONLY a JSON array, no markdown. Each item: {\\\"name\\\":string,\\\"p\\\":string}. \" +\n            \"\\\"p\\\" encodes the measure: beats separated by '|'; within a beat one token per note, no spaces. Token = optional '>' (accent) + 'R'/'L' + optional 'z' (buzz). Token count per beat MUST equal its subdivision. \" +\n            \"Read every numbered exercise in order: left column top-to-bottom, then right column. Output JSON only.\",\n          messages: [{ role: \"user\", content: [\n            { type: \"image\", source: { type: \"base64\", media_type: media, data } },\n            { type: \"text\", text: \"Transcribe all exercises, keeping beats separate and marking triplets, accents, and buzz rolls.\" },\n          ] }],\n        }),\n      });\n      const json = await res.json();\n      const text = (json.content || []).filter((b) => b.type === \"text\").map((b) => b.text).join(\"\\n\").replace(/```json|```/g, \"\").trim();\n      const parsed = JSON.parse(text);\n      if (!Array.isArray(parsed)) throw new Error();\n      setExercises(parsed.map((p, i) => ({ id: `ex-${Date.now()}-${i}`, name: p.name || `Exercise ${i + 1}`, beats: parsePattern(String(p.p || \"\")) })));\n      setStatus(`Read ${parsed.length} exercises. Click a note to cycle plain \u2192 accent \u2192 buzz.`);\n    } catch {\n      setStatus(\"Couldn't read that \u2014 try the Auto enhance preset, a tighter crop, or edit a line manually.\");\n    } finally { setLoading(false); }\n  };\n\n  // ---- authoring edits ----\n  const setName = (id, name) => setExercises((xs) => xs.map((x) => x.id === id ? { ...x, name } : x));\n  const setText = (id, txt) => setExercises((xs) => xs.map((x) => x.id === id ? { ...x, beats: parsePattern(txt) } : x));\n  const cycle = (id, bi, ni) => setExercises((xs) => xs.map((x) => {\n    if (x.id !== id) return x;\n    const beats = x.beats.map((b) => ({ ...b, notes: b.notes.map((n) => ({ ...n })) }));\n    const n = beats[bi].notes[ni];\n    if (!n.accent && n.art === \"tap\") n.accent = true;\n    else if (n.accent && n.art === \"tap\") { n.accent = false; n.art = \"buzz\"; }\n    else { n.accent = false; n.art = \"tap\"; }\n    return { ...x, beats };\n  }));\n  const del = (id) => setExercises((xs) => xs.filter((x) => x.id !== id));\n  const move = (id, dir) => setExercises((xs) => { const i = xs.findIndex((x) => x.id === id); const j = i + dir; if (j < 0 || j >= xs.length) return xs; const n = [...xs]; [n[i], n[j]] = [n[j], n[i]]; return n; });\n  const addBlank = () => setExercises((xs) => [...xs, { id: `ex-${Date.now()}`, name: `Exercise ${xs.length + 1}`, beats: [] }]);\n\n  const jsonOut = useMemo(() => JSON.stringify(exercises.map((x, i) => ({\n    id: x.id, name: x.name, source, timeSignature: [4, 4],\n    beats: x.beats.map((b) => ({ subdivision: b.subdivision, notes: b.notes.map((n) => ({ h: n.h, accent: n.accent, art: n.art })) })),\n    repeatCount: defaults.repeatCount, difficulty: defaults.difficulty, order: i + 1,\n  })), null, 2), [exercises, source, defaults]);\n\n  const copyJson = async () => { try { await navigator.clipboard.writeText(jsonOut); setImportText(\"\");\n    } catch { setStatus(\"Couldn't parse that JSON.\"); }\n  };\n\n  const setEnhField = (k, v) => setEnh((o) => ({ ...o, [k]: v }));\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"min-h-screen font-sans\" style={{ background: C.bg, color: C.text }}>\n      <div className=\"max-w-[1100px] mx-auto px-4 py-6\">\n        <div className=\"mb-6\">\n          <div className=\"text-[11px] tracking-[0.3em] uppercase mb-1\" style={{ color: C.muted }}>Stick Control \u00b7 Admin</div>\n          <h1 className=\"text-2xl font-black tracking-tight\">Read a page</h1>\n        </div>\n\n        {/* IMAGE LOADER + INLINE ENHANCEMENT */}\n        <div className=\"grid md:grid-cols-2 gap-5\">\n          <div>\n            <Label>Page image {imgEl && <span style={{ color: C.muted }}>\u00b7 cleaned</span>}</Label>\n            {!imgEl ? 1000;\\nconst clamp = (v) => (v < 0 ? 0 : v > 255 ? 255 : v);\\nconst subLabel = (n) => ({ 2: \\\"8ths\\\", 3: \\\"triplet\\\", 4: \\\"16ths\\\", 6: \\\"sextuplet\\\" }[n] || `${n}/beat`);\\n\\nconst ENH_PRESETS = {\\n  auto: { grayscale: true, brightness: 0, contrast: 45, sharpen: 1.2, sharpenR: 1.2, threshold: true, threshC: 12, threshR: 14 },\\n  soft: { grayscale: true, brightness: 5, contrast: 30, sharpen: 1.8, sharpenR: 1.5, threshold: false, threshC: 12, threshR: 14 },\\n  none: { grayscale: false, brightness: 0, contrast: 0, sharpen: 0, sharpenR: 1, threshold: false, threshC: 10, threshR: 12 },\\n};\\n\\nfunction parsePattern(p) {\\n  return p.split(\\\"|\\\").map((seg) => {\\n    const notes = [...seg.matchAll(/(>?)([RL])(z?)/gi)].map((m) => ({ h: m[2].toUpperCase(), accent: m[1] === \\\">\\\", art: m[3].toLowerCase() === \\\"z\\\" ? \\\"buzz\\\" : \\\"tap\\\" }));\\n    return { subdivision: notes.length, notes };\\n  }).filter((b) => b.notes.length);\\n}\\nconst serializeBeats = (beats) => beats.map((b) => b.notes.map((n) => (n.accent ? \\\">\\\" : \\\"\\\") + n.h + (n.art === \\\"buzz\\\" ? \\\"z\\\" : \\\"\\\")).join(\\\"\\\")).join(\\\"|\\\");\\n\\nexport default function ExerciseStudio() {\\n  // image + enhancement\\n  const [origUrl, setOrigUrl] = useState(null);\\n  const [originalB64, setOriginalB64] = useState(null);\\n  const [mediaType, setMediaType] = useState(\\\"image/png\\\");\\n  const [imgEl, setImgEl] = useState(null);\\n  const [enh, setEnh] = useState(ENH_PRESETS.auto);\\n  const [showOriginal, setShowOriginal] = useState(false);\\n  const [enhNote, setEnhNote] = useState(\\\"\\\");\\n  const canvasRef = useRef(null);\\n\\n  // authoring\\n  const [source, setSource] = useState(\\\"Short Rolls and Triplets \\u00b7 p.14\\\");\\n  const [defaults, setDefaults] = useState({ repeatCount: 20, difficulty: 3 });\\n  const [exercises, setExercises] = useState([]);\\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);\\n  const [status, setStatus] = useState(\\\"\\\");\\n  const [importText, setImportText] = useState(\\\"\\\");\\n\\n  const onFile = (e) => {\\n    const file = e.target.files?.[0]; if (!file) return;\\n    setMediaType(file.type || \\\"image/png\\\");\\n    const reader = new FileReader();\\n    reader.onload = () => {\\n      const dataUrl = String(reader.result);\\n      setOrigUrl(dataUrl);\\n      setOriginalB64(dataUrl.split(\\\",\\\")[1]);\\n      const img = new Image();\\n      img.onload = () => { setImgEl(img); setEnhNote(\\\"\\\"); };\\n      img.onerror = () => setEnhNote(\\\"Couldn't load that image \\u2014 try a JPG or PNG.\\\");\\n      img.src = dataUrl;\\n    };\\n    reader.readAsDataURL(file);\\n  };\\n\\n  // ---- enhancement pipeline (draws to canvasRef) ----\\n  const process = useCallback(() => {\\n    const img = imgEl, canvas = canvasRef.current;\\n    if (!img || !canvas) return;\\n    const scale = Math.min(1, MAX_W / img.naturalWidth);\\n    const w = Math.round(img.naturalWidth * scale), h = Math.round(img.naturalHeight * scale);\\n    canvas.width = w; canvas.height = h;\\n    const ctx = canvas.getContext(\\\"2d\\\", { willReadFrequently: true });\\n    ctx.filter = \\\"none\\\";\\n    ctx.drawImage(img, 0, 0, w, h);\\n    try {\\n      const cf = (259 * (enh.contrast + 255)) / (255 * (259 - enh.contrast));\\n      const id = ctx.getImageData(0, 0, w, h); const d = id.data;\\n      for (let i = 0; i < d.length; i += 4) {\\n        let r = d[i], g = d[i + 1], b = d[i + 2];\\n        if (enh.grayscale) { const v = 0.299 * r + 0.587 * g + 0.114 * b; r = g = b = v; }\\n        d[i] = clamp(cf * (r - 128) + 128 + enh.brightness);\\n        d[i + 1] = clamp(cf * (g - 128) + 128 + enh.brightness);\\n        d[i + 2] = clamp(cf * (b - 128) + 128 + enh.brightness);\\n      }\\n      ctx.putImageData(id, 0, 0);\\n\\n      if (enh.sharpen > 0) {\\n        const t = document.createElement(\\\"canvas\\\"); t.width = w; t.height = h;\\n        const tc = t.getContext(\\\"2d\\\"); tc.filter = `blur(${enh.sharpenR}px)`; tc.drawImage(canvas, 0, 0);\\n        const blur = tc.getImageData(0, 0, w, h).data;\\n        const cur = ctx.getImageData(0, 0, w, h); const cd = cur.data; const a = enh.sharpen;\\n        for (let i = 0; i < cd.length; i += 4) {\\n          cd[i] = clamp(cd[i] + a * (cd[i] - blur[i]));\\n          cd[i + 1] = clamp(cd[i + 1] + a * (cd[i + 1] - blur[i + 1]));\\n          cd[i + 2] = clamp(cd[i + 2] + a * (cd[i + 2] - blur[i + 2]));\\n        }\\n        ctx.putImageData(cur, 0, 0);\\n      }\\n\\n      if (enh.threshold) {\\n        const t = document.createElement(\\\"canvas\\\"); t.width = w; t.height = h;\\n        const tc = t.getContext(\\\"2d\\\"); tc.filter = `blur(${enh.threshR}px)`; tc.drawImage(canvas, 0, 0);\\n        const mean = tc.getImageData(0, 0, w, h).data;\\n        const cur = ctx.getImageData(0, 0, w, h); const cd = cur.data;\\n        for (let i = 0; i < cd.length; i += 4) {\\n          const gray = 0.299 * cd[i] + 0.587 * cd[i + 1] + 0.114 * cd[i + 2];\\n          const m = 0.299 * mean[i] + 0.587 * mean[i + 1] + 0.114 * mean[i + 2];\\n          const val = gray > m - enh.threshC ? 255 : 0;\\n          cd[i] = cd[i + 1] = cd[i + 2] = val;\\n        }\\n        ctx.putImageData(cur, 0, 0);\\n      }\\n    } catch {\\n      setEnhNote(\\\"Preview frame blocked pixel processing \\u2014 the original will be read instead. Enhancement runs fully in your app.\\\");\\n    }\\n  }, [imgEl, enh]);\\n\\n  useEffect(() => { process(); }, [process]);\\n\\n  // enhanced base64 (falls back to original if the canvas is unreadable)\\n  const enhancedImage = () => {\\n    const canvas = canvasRef.current;\\n    if (canvas) { try { return { data: canvas.toDataURL(\\\"image/png\\\").split(\\\",\\\")[1], media: \\\"image/png\\\" }; } catch {} }\\n    return { data: originalB64, media: mediaType };\\n  };\\n\\n  // ---- vision read on the enhanced image ----\\n  const extract = async () => {\\n    if (!imgEl) { setStatus(\\\"Upload a page image first.\\\"); return; }\\n    setLoading(true); setStatus(\\\"Reading the cleaned image\\u2026\\\");\\n    try {\\n      const { data, media } = enhancedImage();\\n      const res = await fetch(\\\"https://api.anthropic.com/v1/messages\\\", {\\n        method: \\\"POST\\\", headers: { \\\"Content-Type\\\": \\\"application/json\\\" },\\n        body: JSON.stringify({\\n          model: \\\"claude-sonnet-4-6\\\", max_tokens: 1000,\\n          system:\\n            \\\"You read snare-drum practice pages and output a compact transcription. \\\" +\\n            \\\"Under each numbered exercise are printed sticking letters R (right) / L (left), beamed into beats. A 16th-note beat has 4 notes; a beat marked with a small '3' (triplet) has 3 notes. Some notes have an accent (>). A slashed stem / tremolo mark is a buzz (multiple-bounce) roll. \\\" +\\n            \\\"Return ONLY a JSON array, no markdown. Each item: {\\\\\\\"name\\\\\\\":string,\\\\\\\"p\\\\\\\":string}. \\\" +\\n            \\\"\\\\\\\"p\\\\\\\" encodes the measure: beats separated by '|'; within a beat one token per note, no spaces. Token = optional '>' (accent) + 'R'/'L' + optional 'z' (buzz). Token count per beat MUST equal its subdivision. \\\" +\\n            \\\"Read every numbered exercise in order: left column top-to-bottom, then right column. Output JSON only.\\\",\\n          messages: [{ role: \\\"user\\\", content: [\\n            { type: \\\"image\\\", source: { type: \\\"base64\\\", media_type: media, data } },\\n            { type: \\\"text\\\", text: \\\"Transcribe all exercises, keeping beats separate and marking triplets, accents, and buzz rolls.\\\" },\\n          ] }],\\n        }),\\n      });\\n      const json = await res.json();\\n      const text = (json.content || []).filter((b) => b.type === \\\"text\\\").map((b) => b.text).join(\\\"\\\\n\\\").replace(/```json|```/g, \\\"\\\").trim();\\n      const parsed = JSON.parse(text);\\n      if (!Array.isArray(parsed)) throw new Error();\\n      setExercises(parsed.map((p, i) => ({ id: `ex-${Date.now()}-${i}`, name: p.name || `Exercise ${i + 1}`, beats: parsePattern(String(p.p || \\\"\\\")) })));\\n      setStatus(`Read ${parsed.length} exercises. Click a note to cycle plain \\u2192 accent \\u2192 buzz.`);\\n    } catch {\\n      setStatus(\\\"Couldn't read that \\u2014 try the Auto enhance preset, a tighter crop, or edit a line manually.\\\");\\n    } finally { setLoading(false); }\\n  };\\n\\n  // ---- authoring edits ----\\n  const setName = (id, name) => setExercises((xs) => xs.map((x) => x.id === id ? { ...x, name } : x));\\n  const setText = (id, txt) => setExercises((xs) => xs.map((x) => x.id === id ? { ...x, beats: parsePattern(txt) } : x));\\n  const cycle = (id, bi, ni) => setExercises((xs) => xs.map((x) => {\\n    if (x.id !== id) return x;\\n    const beats = x.beats.map((b) => ({ ...b, notes: b.notes.map((n) => ({ ...n })) }));\\n    const n = beats[bi].notes[ni];\\n    if (!n.accent && n.art === \\\"tap\\\") n.accent = true;\\n    else if (n.accent && n.art === \\\"tap\\\") { n.accent = false; n.art = \\\"buzz\\\"; }\\n    else { n.accent = false; n.art = \\\"tap\\\"; }\\n    return { ...x, beats };\\n  }));\\n  const del = (id) => setExercises((xs) => xs.filter((x) => x.id !== id));\\n  const move = (id, dir) => setExercises((xs) => { const i = xs.findIndex((x) => x.id === id); const j = i + dir; if (j < 0 || j >= xs.length) return xs; const n = [...xs]; [n[i], n[j]] = [n[j], n[i]]; return n; });\\n  const addBlank = () => setExercises((xs) => [...xs, { id: `ex-${Date.now()}`, name: `Exercise ${xs.length + 1}`, beats: [] }]);\\n\\n  const jsonOut = useMemo(() => JSON.stringify(exercises.map((x, i) => ({\\n    id: x.id, name: x.name, source, timeSignature: [4, 4],\\n    beats: x.beats.map((b) => ({ subdivision: b.subdivision, notes: b.notes.map((n) => ({ h: n.h, accent: n.accent, art: n.art })) })),\\n    repeatCount: defaults.repeatCount, difficulty: defaults.difficulty, order: i + 1,\\n  })), null, 2), [exercises, source, defaults]);\\n\\n  const copyJson = async () => { try { await navigator.clipboard.writeText(jsonOut); setStatus(\\\"JSON copied.\\\"); } catch { setStatus(\\\"Copy blocked \\u2014 select manually.\\\"); } };\\n  const doImport = () => {\\n    try {\\n      const arr = JSON.parse(importText);\\n      setExercises(arr.map((x, i) => ({ id: x.id || `ex-${Date.now()}-${i}`, name: x.name, beats: (x.beats || []).map((b) => ({ subdivision: b.subdivision || b.notes.length, notes: b.notes.map((n) => ({ h: n.h, accent: !!n.accent, art: n.art || \\\"tap\\\" })) })) })));\\n      setStatus(`Imported ${arr.length} exercises.`); setImportText(\\\"\\\");\\n    } catch { setStatus(\\\"Couldn't parse that JSON.\\\"); }\\n  };\\n\\n  const setEnhField = (k, v) => setEnh((o) => ({ ...o, [k]: v }));\\n\\n  return (\\n    <div className=\\\"min-h-screen font-sans\\\" style={{ background: C.bg, color: C.text }}>\\n      <div className=\\\"max-w-[1100px] mx-auto px-4 py-6\\\">\\n        <div className=\\\"mb-6\\\">\\n          <div className=\\\"text-[11px] tracking-[0.3em] uppercase mb-1\\\" style={{ color: C.muted }}>Stick Control \\u00b7 Admin</div>\\n          <h1 className=\\\"text-2xl font-black tracking-tight\\\">Read a page</h1>\\n        </div>\\n\\n        {/* IMAGE LOADER + INLINE ENHANCEMENT */}\\n        <div className=\\\"grid md:grid-cols-2 gap-5\\\">\\n          <div>\\n            <Label>Page image {imgEl && <span style={{ color: C.muted }}>\\u00b7 cleaned</span>}</Label>\\n            {!imgEl ? (\\n              <label className=\\\"flex flex-col items-center justify-center h-56 rounded-xl border cursor-pointer text-center px-6\\\" style={{ borderColor: C.border, background: C.panel }}>\\n                <div className=\\\"text-4xl mb-2\\\" style={{ color: C.muted }}>+</div>\\n                <div className=\\\"font-semibold mb-1\\\">Upload your page scan</div>\\n                <div className=\\\"text-sm\\\" style={{ color: C.muted }}>It's auto-cleaned, then read for you.</div>\\n                <input type=\\\"file\\\" accept=\\\"image/*\\\" onChange={onFile} className=\\\"hidden\\\" />\\n              </label>\\n            ) : (\\n              <>\\n                <div className=\\\"rounded-xl border overflow-hidden mb-2\\\" style={{ borderColor: C.border, background: \\\"#fff\\\" }}>\\n                  <img src={origUrl} alt=\\\"original\\\" className=\\\"w-full block\\\" style={{ display: showOriginal ? \\\"block\\\" : \\\"none\\\" }} />\\n                  <canvas ref={canvasRef} className=\\\"w-full block\\\" style={{ display: showOriginal ? \\\"none\\\" : \\\"block\\\" }} />\\n                </div>\\n                <div className=\\\"flex items-center justify-between mb-3 text-sm\\\">\\n                  <label className=\\\"flex items-center gap-2 cursor-pointer\\\" style={{ color: C.muted }}>\\n                    <input type=\\\"checkbox\\\" checked={showOriginal} onChange={(e) => setShowOriginal(e.target.checked)} /> Show original\\n                  </label>\\n                  <label className=\\\"cursor-pointer\\\" style={{ color: C.muted }}>Replace<input type=\\\"file\\\" accept=\\\"image/*\\\" onChange={onFile} className=\\\"hidden\\\" /></label>\\n                </div>\\n                <button onClick={extract} disabled={loading} className=\\\"w-full py-4 rounded-xl font-black text-lg active:scale-[0.99] transition disabled:opacity-40\\\" style={{ background: C.R, color: C.bg }}>\\n                  {loading ? \\\"Reading\\u2026\\\" : \\\"Read exercises from image\\\"}\\n                </button>\\n                {status && <div className=\\\"text-sm mt-3\\\" style={{ color: C.R }}>{status}</div>}\\n              </>\\n            )}\\n          </div>\\n\\n          {/* enhancement controls */}\\n          <div>\\n            <Label>Fix image</Label>\\n            <div className=\\\"rounded-xl border p-4\\\" style={{ borderColor: C.border, background: C.panel }}>\\n              <div className=\\\"flex gap-2 mb-4\\\">\\n                {[[\\\"auto\\\", className=\\\"flex-1 py-2 rounded-lg text-sm font-semibold active:scale-95 transition\\\" style={{ background: C.bg, border: `1px solid ${C.border}`, color: C.text }}>{label}</button>\\n                ))}\\n              </div>\\n              <div className=\\\"grid grid-cols-2 gap-x-5 gap-y-3\\\">\\n                <Toggle label=\\\"Grayscale\\\" on={enh.grayscale} onChange={(v) => label=\\\"Contrast\\\" min={0} max={120} value={enh.contrast} onChange={(v) => setEnhField(\\\"contrast\\\", v)} />\\n                <Slider label=\\\"Brightness\\\" min={-60} max={60} value={enh.brightness} onChange={(v) => setEnhField(\\\"brightness\\\", v)} />\\n                <Slider label=\\\"Sharpen\\\" min={0} max={3} step={0.1} value={enh.sharpen} onChange={(v) => />}\\n              </div>\\n              {enhNote && <div className=\\\"text-xs mt-3\\\" style={{ color: C.muted }}>{enhNote}</div>}\\n              {!imgEl && <div className=\\\"text-xs mt-3\\\" style={{ color: C.muted }}>Upload an image to fix it. Auto suits most printed pages.</div>}\\n            </div>\\n          </div>\\n        </div>\\n\\n        {/* DEFAULTS + LEGEND */}\\n        <div className=\\\"mt-5 rounded-xl border p-4 grid md:grid-cols-[2fr_1fr_1fr_auto] gap-4 items-end\\\" style={{ borderColor: C.border, background: C.panel }}>\\n          <Field label=\\\"Source / page\\\"><input value={source} onChange={(e) => setSource(e.target.value)} className=\\\"w-full rounded-lg px-3 py-2 text-sm outline-none\\\" style={{ background: C.bg, border: `1px solid ${C.border}`, color: C.text }} /></Field>\\n          <Field label=\\\"Repeats\\\"><input type=\\\"number\\\" min={1} value={defaults.repeatCount} onChange={(e) => setDefaults((d) => ({ ...d, repeatCount: +e.target.value }))} className=\\\"w-full rounded-lg px-2 py-2 text-sm outline-none\\\" style={{ background: C.bg, border: `1px solid ${C.border}`, color: C.text }} /></Field>\\n          <Field label=\\\"Difficulty\\\"><select value={defaults.difficulty} onChange={(e) => setDefaults((d) => ({ ...d, difficulty: +e.target.value }))} className=\\\"w-full rounded-lg px-2 py-2 text-sm outline-none\\\" style={{ background: C.bg, border: `1px solid ${C.border}`, color: C.text }}>{[1, 2, 3, 4, 5].map((d) => <option key={d} value={d}>{d}</option>)}</select></Field>\\n          <div className=\\\"flex flex-wrap gap-3 text-xs pb-2\\\" style={{ color: C.muted }}>\\n            <Legend swatch={C.R} text=\\\"R\\\" /><Legend swatch={C.L} text=\\\"L\\\" />\\n            <span className=\\\"flex items-center gap-1.5\\\"><Chip h=\\\"R\\\" accent /> accent</span>\\n            <span className=\\\"flex items-center gap-1.5\\\"><Chip h=\\\"L\\\" buzz /> buzz</span>\\n          </div>\\n        </div>\\n\\n        {/* REVIEW */}\\n        <div className=\\\"mt-8 flex items-center justify-between\\\">\\n          <Label>Review \\u2014 beats, subdivisions &amp; articulations</Label>\\n          <button onClick={addBlank} className=\\\"text-sm px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg\\\" style={{ background: C.panel, border: `1px solid ${C.border}`, color: C.text }}>+ Add line</button>\\n        </div>\\n        {exercises.length === 0 ? (\\n          <div className=\\\"rounded-xl border p-8 text-center text-sm\\\" style={{ borderColor: C.border, color: C.muted }}>Upload a page and tap \\u201cRead exercises from image.\\u201d</div>\\n        ) : (\\n          <div className=\\\"space-y-2\\\">\\n            {exercises.map((x, i) => (\\n              <div key={x.id} className=\\\"rounded-xl border p-3\\\" style={{ borderColor: C.border, background: C.panel }}>\\n                <div className=\\\"flex items-center gap-2 mb-3\\\">\\n                  <span className=\\\"font-mono text-sm w-6 text-center\\\" style={{ color: C.muted }}>{i + 1}</span>\\n                  <input value={x.name} onChange={(e) => setName(x.id, e.target.value)} className=\\\"flex-1 rounded-lg px-2 py-1.5 text-sm outline-none\\\" style={{ background: C.bg, border: `1px solid ${C.border}`, color: C.text }} />\\n                  <IconBtn onClick={() => move(x.id, -1)} disabled={i === 0}>\\u2191</IconBtn>\\n                  <IconBtn onClick={() => move(x.id, 1)} disabled={i === exercises.length - 1}>\\u2193</IconBtn>\\n                  <IconBtn onClick={() => del(x.id)} danger>\\u2715</IconBtn>\\n                </div>\\n                <div className=\\\"flex flex-wrap items-start gap-x-4 gap-y-3 pl-8 mb-3\\\">\\n                  {x.beats.map((b, bi) => (\\n                    <div key={bi} className=\\\"flex flex-col items-center\\\">\\n                      <div className=\\\"flex gap-1\\\">\\n                        {b.notes.map((n, ni) => (\\n                          <button key={ni} onClick={() => cycle(x.id, bi, ni)} title=\\\"plain \\u2192 accent \\u2192 buzz\\\"><Chip h={n.h} accent={n.accent} buzz={n.art === \\\"buzz\\\"} /></button>\\n                        ))}\\n                      </div>\\n                      <span className=\\\"text-[10px] mt-1\\\" style={{ color: C.muted }}>Beat {bi + 1} \\u00b7 {subLabel(b.subdivision)}</span>\\n                    </div>\\n                  ))}\\n                </div>\\n                <div className=\\\"flex items-center gap-2 pl-8\\\">\\n                  <span className=\\\"text-[10px] uppercase tracking-wider\\\" style={{ color: C.muted }}>Edit</span>\\n                  <input value={serializeBeats(x.beats)} onChange={(e) => setText(x.id, e.target.value)} placeholder=\\\"RLRL|RLRL|RLR|LRL\\\" className=\\\"flex-1 rounded-lg px-2 py-1.5 text-sm font-mono outline-none placeholder:text-[#5a524b]\\\" style={{ background: C.bg, border: `1px solid ${C.border}`, color: C.text }} />\\n                </div>\\n              </div>\\n            ))}\\n          </div>\\n        )}\\n\\n        {/* DATA I/O */}\\n        <div className=\\\"mt-8 grid md:grid-cols-2 gap-5\\\">\\n          <div>\\n            <Label>Export \\u2014 full rhythmic model</Label>\\n            <textarea readOnly value={jsonOut} className=\\\"w-full h-44 rounded-xl p-3 text-xs font-mono outline-none resize-none\\\" style={{ background: C.panel, border: `1px solid ${C.border}`, color: C.text }} />\\n            <button onClick={copyJson} className=\\\"mt-2 w-full py-2.5 rounded-lg font-semibold\\\" style={{ background: C.L, color: C.bg }}>Copy JSON</button>\\n          </div>\\n          <div>\\n            <Label>Import \\u2014 paste saved JSON</Label>\\n            <textarea value={importText} onChange={(e) => setImportText(e.target.value)} placeholder=\\\"Paste exercises JSON\\u2026\\\" className=\\\"w-full h-44 rounded-xl p-3 text-xs font-mono outline-none resize-none placeholder:text-[#5a524b]\\\" style={{ background: C.panel, border: `1px solid ${C.border}`, color: C.text }} />\\n            <button onClick={doImport} className=\\\"mt-2 w-full py-2.5 rounded-lg font-semibold\\\" style={{ background: C.bg, border: `1px solid ${C.border}`, color: C.text }}>Load JSON</button>\\n          </div>\\n        </div>\\n      </div>\\n    </div>\\n  );\\n}\\n\\nfunction Chip({ h, accent, buzz }) {\\n  const bg = h === \\\"R\\\" ? C.R : C.L;\\n  return (\\n    <span className=\\\"relative w-7 h-7 rounded flex items-center justify-center text-sm font-black\\\" style={{ color: C.bg, background: bg, border: buzz ? `2px dashed ${C.mark}` : \\\"none\\\", boxShadow: accent ? `0 0 0 2px ${C.bg}, 0 0 0 3px ${C.mark}` : \\\"none\\\" }}>\\n      {accent && <span className=\\\"absolute -top-3 text-xs font-bold\\\" style={{ color: C.mark }}>{\\\">\\\"}</span>}\\n      {buzz && <span className=\\\"absolute -bottom-3 text-[9px] font-bold\\\" style={{ color: C.mark }}>\\u224b</span>}\\n      {h}\\n    </span>\\n  );\\n}\\nfunction Legend({ swatch, text }) { return <span className=\\\"flex items-center gap-1.5\\\"><span className=\\\"w-3 h-3 rounded\\\" style={{ background: swatch }} />{text}</span>; }\\nfunction Label({ children }) { return <div className=\\\"text-[11px] tracking-[0.25em] uppercase mb-2\\\" style={{ color: C.muted }}>{children}</div>; }\\nfunction Field({ label, children }) { return (<div><div className=\\\"text-[11px] tracking-[0.15em] uppercase mb-1.5\\\" style={{ color: C.muted }}>{label}</div>{children}</div>); }\\nfunction IconBtn({ children, onClick, disabled, danger }) { return <button onClick={onClick} disabled={disabled} className=\\\"w-8 h-8 rounded-lg text-sm active:scale-90 transition disabled:opacity-30\\\" style={{ background: C.bg, border: `1px solid ${C.border}`, color: danger ?
