      "file_text": "import React, { useState, useRef, useEffect, useCallback } from \"react\";\n\n/**\n * DrumTrainerPro \u2014 practices the grouped/subdivision/buzz model.\n *\n * Timing: each beat lasts 60/tempo sec; notes inside it are spaced\n * beatDur/subdivision \u2014 so 16ths(4), triplets(3), 8ths(2), single(1) all\n * play correctly from the same data. Downbeats and accents click harder;\n * buzz notes get a noise cue + dashed marker.\n *\n * Feed it the admin's exported JSON (Paste my JSON), or try the verified\n * sample. Bad data will sound wrong \u2014 that's a feature here.\n */\n\nconst C = { bg: \"#14110F\", panel: \"#1F1A17\", border: \"#2E2825\", text: \"#EDE6DD\", muted: \"#8A7E73\", R: \"#E8A33D\", L: \"#4FB0A5\", mark: \"#EDE6DD\" };\n\nconst LEVELS = [\n  { level: 1, label: \"Beginner\", tempo: 60 }, { level: 2, label: \"Developing\", tempo: 76 },\n  { level: 3, label: \"Intermediate\", tempo: 92 }, { level: 4, label: \"Advanced\", tempo: 110 }, { level: 5, label: \"Expert\", tempo: 130 },\n];\nconst DAILY = [5, 10, 15, 20];\n\n// build sample exercises from the compact pattern grammar (>accent, z=buzz)\nfunction parsePattern(p) {\n  return p.split(\"|\").map((seg) => {\n    const notes = [...seg.matchAll(/(>?)([RL])(z?)/gi)].map((m) => ({ h: m[2].toUpperCase(), accent: m[1] === \">\", art: m[3].toLowerCase() === \"z\" ? \"buzz\" : \"tap\" }));\n    return { subdivision: notes.length, notes };\n  }).filter((b) => b.notes.length);\n}\nconst mk = (name, p, reps) => ({ id: name, name, beats: parsePattern(p), repeatCount: reps });\nconst SAMPLE = [\n  mk(\"Straight 16ths\", \"RLRL|RLRL|RLRL|RLRL\", 8),\n  mk(\"16ths into triplets\", \"RLRL|RRLL|RLR|LRL\", 8),\n  mk(\"Accents + buzz roll\", \">RLRL|RRLL|RzLzRz|LzRzLz\", 6),\n];\n\nconst fmt = (s) => `${Math.floor(s / 60)}:${String(Math.round(s % 60)).padStart(2, \"0\")}`;\nconst exSeconds = (ex, tempo) => ex.beats.length * (60 / tempo) * ex.repeatCount;\nconst countFor = (beatNo, sub) =>\n  sub === 4 ? [String(beatNo), \"e\", \"&\", \"a\"] : sub === 3 ? [String(beatNo), \"trip\", \"let\"] : sub === 2 ? [String(beatNo), \"&\"] : sub === 1 ? [String(beatNo)] : [String(beatNo), ...Array(sub - 1).fill(\"\u00b7\")];\n\nexport default function DrumTrainerPro() {\n  const [screen, setScreen] = useState(\"setup\");\n  const [level, setLevel] = useState(LEVELS[0]);\n  const [dailyMin, setDailyMin] = useState(10);\n  const [useSample, setUseSample] = useState(true);\n  const [pasteText, setPasteText] = useState(\"\");\n  const [setupErr, setSetupErr] = useState(\"\");\n\n  const [queue, setQueue] = useState([]);\n  const [goalCount, setGoalCount] = useState(0);\n  const [activeIdx, setActiveIdx] = useState(0);\n  const [completed, setCompleted] = useState([]);\n  const [isPlaying, setIsPlaying] = useState(false);\n  const [beatIdx, setBeatIdx] = useState(0);\n  const [noteIdx, setNoteIdx] = useState(0);\n  const [repsDone, setRepsDone] = useState(0);\n  const [sessionSec, setSessionSec] = useState(0);\n\n  const ctxRef = useRef(null), noiseRef = useRef(null);\n  const sched = useRef(null), raf = useRef(null), sec = useRef(null);\n  const nextT = useRef(0), exI = useRef(0), measR = useRef(0), beatR = useRef(0), noteR = useRef(0);\n  const qRef = useRef([]), tempoRef = useRef(60), doneRef = useRef([]), noteQ = useRef([]);\n\n  const tempo = level.tempo;\n\n  const start = () => {\n    let data = SAMPLE;\n    if (!useSample) {\n      try {\n        const arr = JSON.parse(pasteText);\n        if (!Array.isArray(arr) || !arr.length) throw new Error();\n        data = arr.map((x) => ({ id: x.id, name: x.name, repeatCount: x.repeatCount || 8, beats: (x.beats || []).map((b) => ({ subdivision: b.subdivision || b.notes.length, notes: b.notes })) }));\n      } catch { setSetupErr(\"That JSON didn't parse. Paste the admin's exported array.\"); return; }\n    }\n    const budget = dailyMin * 60;\n    let acc = 0, fit = 0;\n    for (const ex of data) { acc += exSeconds(ex, tempo); fit++; if (acc >= budget) break; }\n    setQueue(data); qRef.current = data; setGoalCount(Math.max(1, Math.min(data.length, fit)));\n    setActiveIdx(0); setCompleted([]); doneRef.current = []; setSessionSec(0); setRepsDone(0); setBeatIdx(0); setNoteIdx(0);\n    exI.current = 0; measR.current = 0; beatR.current = 0; noteR.current = 0; noteQ.current = []; tempoRef.current = tempo;\n    setSetupErr(\"\"); setScreen(\"session\");\n  };\n\n  // ---- audio ----\n  const ensureAudio = async () => {\n    if (!ctxRef.current) {\n      const ctx = new (window.AudioContext || window.webkitAudioContext)();\n      ctxRef.current = ctx;\n      const buf = ctx.createBuffer(1, ctx.sampleRate * 0.2, ctx.sampleRate);\n      const d = buf.getChannelData(0);\n      for (let i = 0; i < d.length; i++) d[i] = Math.random() * 2 - 1;\n      noiseRef.current = buf;\n    }\n    await ctxRef.current.resume();\n  };\n  const tick = (time, freq, gain) => {\n    const ctx = ctxRef.current, o = ctx.createOscillator(), g = ctx.createGain();\n    o.frequency.value = freq; g.gain.setValueAtTime(gain, time); g.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.0001, time + 0.05);\n    o.connect(g).connect(ctx.destination); o.start(time); o.stop(time + 0.06);\n  };\n  const buzz = (time) => {\n    const ctx = ctxRef.current, s = ctx.createBufferSource(), g = ctx.createGain(), bp = ctx.createBiquadFilter();\n    s.buffer = noiseRef.current; bp.type = \"bandpass\"; bp.frequency.value = 2500;\n    g.gain.setValueAtTime(0.25, time); g.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.0001, time + 0.11);\n    s.connect(bp).connect(g).connect(ctx.destination); s.start(time); s.stop(time + 0.12);\n  };\n  const playNote = (time, note, isDown, isBeat) => {\n    if (note.art === \"buzz\") return buzz(time);\n    if (note.accent) return tick(time, 1600, 0.5);\n    if (isDown) return tick(time, 1200, 0.45);\n    if (isBeat) return tick(time, 1000, 0.32);\n    tick(time, 800, 0.18);\n  };\n\n  const scheduler = useCallback(() => {\n    const ctx = ctxRef.current;\n    while (nextT.current < ctx.currentTime + 0.12) {\n      const ex = qRef.current[exI.current];\n      if (!ex) { finish(); return; }\n      const beats = ex.beats, mb = beats.length, beat = beats[beatR.current];\n      const sub = beat.subdivision || beat.notes.length, note = beat.notes[noteR.current];\n      const beatDur = 60 / tempoRef.current, secPerNote = beatDur / sub;\n      playNote(nextT.current, note, beatR.current === 0 && noteR.current === 0, noteR.current === 0);\n      noteQ.current.push({ time: nextT.current, exIdx: exI.current, b: beatR.current, n: noteR.current, m: measR.current });\n      nextT.current += secPerNote;\n      if (++noteR.current >= sub) {\n        noteR.current = 0;\n        if (++beatR.current >= mb) {\n          beatR.current = 0;\n          if (++measR.current >= ex.repeatCount) {\n            if (!doneRef.current.includes(exI.current)) { doneRef.current = [...doneRef.current, exI.current]; setCompleted([...doneRef.current]); }\n            exI.current++; measR.current = 0;\n          }\n        }\n      }\n    }\n  }, []);\n\n  const draw = useCallback(() => {\n    const ctx = ctxRef.current;\n    if (ctx) while (noteQ.current.length && noteQ.current[0].time <= ctx.currentTime) {\n      const e = noteQ.current.shift(); setActiveIdx(e.exIdx); setBeatIdx(e.b); setNoteIdx(e.n); setRepsDone(e.m);\n    }\n    raf.current = requestAnimationFrame(draw);\n  }, []);\n\n  const play = async () => {\n    await ensureAudio();\n    nextT.current = ctxRef.current.currentTime + 0.06;\n    setIsPlaying(true);\n    sched.current = setInterval(scheduler, 25);\n    raf.current = requestAnimationFrame(draw);\n    sec.current = setInterval(() => setSessionSec((s) => s + 1), 1000);\n  };\n  const pause = () => { setIsPlaying(false); clearInterval(sched.current); clearInterval(sec.current); cancelAnimationFrame(raf.current); noteQ.current = []; };\n  const finish = () => { pause(); setScreen(\"summary\"); };\n  const skip = () => {\n    const i = exI.current;\n    if (!doneRef.current.includes(i)) { doneRef.current = [...doneRef.current, i]; setCompleted([...doneRef.current]); }\n    exI.current++; measR.current = 0; beatR.current = 0; noteR.current = 0; noteQ.current = [];\n    if (exI.current >= qRef.current.length) finish();\n  };\n  useEffect(() => () => pause(), []);\n\n  // ---------- SETUP ----------\n  if (screen === \"setup\") {\n    return (\n      <div className=\"min-h-screen flex justify-center font-sans\" style={{ background: C.bg, color: C.text }}>\n        <div className=\"w-full max-w-[440px] px-5 py-8\">\n          <div className=\"text-[11px] tracking-[0.3em] uppercase mb-1\" style={{ color: C.muted }}>Stick Control</div>\n          <h1 className=\"text-3xl font-black tracking-tight mb-8\">Daily Practice</h1>\n\n          <Sec label=\"Level \u2014 sets tempo\">\n            <div className=\"space-y-2\">\n              {LEVELS.map((l) => (\n                <button key={l.level} onClick={() => setLevel(l)} className=\"w-full flex justify-between px-4 py-3 rounded-lg border text-left transition\"\n                  style={{ borderColor: level.level === l.level ? C.R : C.border, background: level.level === l.level ? \"#241C12\" : C.panel }}>\n                  <span className=\"font-semibold\">Level {l.level} \u00b7 {l.label}</span><span className=\"font-mono\" style={{ color: C.R }}>{l.tempo} BPM</span>\n                </button>\n              ))}\n            </div>\n          </Sec>\n\n          <Sec label=\"Daily goal\">\n            <div className=\"flex gap-2\">\n              {DAILY.map((m) => (\n                <button key={m} onClick={() => setDailyMin(m)} className=\"flex-1 py-3 rounded-lg border font-mono transition\"\n                  style={{ borderColor: dailyMin === m ? C.L : C.border, background: dailyMin === m ? \"#15211F\" : C.panel, color: dailyMin === m ? C.L : C.text }}>{m}m</button>\n              ))}\n            </div>\n          </Sec>\n\n          <Sec label=\"Exercises\">\n            <div className=\"flex gap-2 mb-3\">\n              <button onClick={() => setUseSample(true)} className=\"flex-1 py-2.5 rounded-lg border text-sm font-semibold\" style={{ borderColor: useSample ? C.R : C.border, background: useSample ? \"#241C12\" : C.panel }}>Verified sample</button>\n              <button onClick={() => setUseSample(false)} className=\"flex-1 py-2.5 rounded-lg border text-sm font-semibold\" style={{ borderColor: !useSample ? C.R : C.border, background: !useSample ? \"#241C12\" : C.panel }}>Paste my JSON</button>\n            </div>\n            {!useSample && <textarea value={pasteText} onChange={(e) => setPasteText(e.target.value)} placeholder=\"Paste the admin's exported array\u2026\" className=\"w-full h-28 rounded-lg p-3 text-xs font-mono outline-none resize-none placeholder:text-[#5a524b]\" style={{ background: C.panel, border: `1px solid ${C.border}`, color: C.text }} />}\n          </Sec>\n\n          {setupErr && <div className=\"text-sm mb-3\" style={{ color: C.R }}>{setupErr}</div>}\n          <button onClick={start} className=\"w-full py-4 rounded-xl font-black text-lg active:scale-[0.99] transition\" style={{ background: C.R, color: C.bg }}>Start practice</button>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n    );\n  }\n\n  // ---------- SUMMARY ----------\n  if (screen === \"summary\") {\n    const goal = dailyMin * 60, under = sessionSec < goal;\n    return (\n      <div className=\"min-h-screen flex justify-center font-sans\" style={{ background: C.bg, color: C.text }}>\n        <div className=\"w-full max-w-[440px] px-5 py-10 text-center\">\n          <div className=\"text-[11px] tracking-[0.3em] uppercase mb-2\" style={{ color: C.muted }}>Session complete</div>\n          <div className=\"text-6xl font-black font-mono mb-1\" style={{ color: under ? C.R : C.L }}>{fmt(sessionSec)}</div>\n          <div className=\"mb-8\" style={{ color: C.muted }}>of your {dailyMin}:00 goal</div>\n          <div className=\"rounded-xl border p-5 mb-6 text-left\" style={{ borderColor: C.border, background: C.panel }}>\n            <Row k=\"Exercises completed\" v={`${completed.length} / ${queue.length}`} />\n            <Row k=\"Level\" v={`${level.level} \u00b7 ${level.tempo} BPM`} />\n          </div>\n          <div className=\"rounded-xl p-4 mb-8 text-sm border\" style={{ borderColor: under ? \"#5a4321\" : \"#234a45\", background: under ? \"#241C12\" : \"#15211F\", color: under ? C.R : C.L }}>\n            {under ? `You're ${fmt(goal - sessionSec)} short of today's goal \u2014 one more exercise gets you there.` : \"Goal met. Bump the level when this tempo feels easy.\"}\n          </div>\n          <button onClick={() => setScreen(\"setup\")} className=\"w-full py-4 rounded-xl font-black text-lg\" style={{ background: C.R, color: C.bg }}>Done</button>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n    );\n  }\n\n  // ---------- SESSION ----------\n  const ex = queue[activeIdx] || queue[0];\n  const goalReached = completed.length >= goalCount;\n  const curNote = ex?.beats[beatIdx]?.notes[noteIdx];\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"min-h-screen flex justify-center font-sans select-none\" style={{ background: C.bg, color: C.text }}>\n      <div className=\"w-full max-w-[440px] px-5 py-6 flex flex-col\">\n        <div className=\"flex justify-between text-[11px] tracking-[0.25em] uppercase mb-1\" style={{ color: C.muted }}>\n          <span>Exercise {activeIdx + 1} / {queue.length}</span><span className=\"font-mono normal-case tracking-normal\">{fmt(sessionSec)} / {dailyMin}:00</span>\n        </div>\n        <div className=\"h-1 rounded-full mb-6 overflow-hidden\" style={{ background: C.border }}>\n          <div className=\"h-full transition-all\" style={{ width: `${Math.min(100, (sessionSec / (dailyMin * 60)) * 100)}%`, background: goalReached ? C.L : C.R }} />\n        </div>\n\n        {/* focal current hand */}\n        <div className=\"flex-1 flex flex-col items-center justify-center\">\n          <div className=\"text-xs tracking-[0.25em] uppercase mb-5\" style={{ color: C.muted }}>{ex?.name}</div>\n          <div className=\"w-28 h-32 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center text-7xl font-black mb-2 transition-all duration-75\"\n            style={{\n              color: curNote ? C.bg : C.muted,\n              background: curNote ? (curNote.h === \"R\" ? C.R : C.L) : C.panel,\n              border: curNote?.art === \"buzz\" ? `3px dashed ${C.mark}` : \"none\",\n              boxShadow: curNote?.accent ? `0 0 0 3px ${C.bg}, 0 0 0 5px ${C.mark}` : \"none\",\n            }}>\n            {curNote?.h || \"\u2013\"}\n          </div>\n          <div className=\"font-mono text-sm mb-8\" style={{ color: C.muted }}>\n            {Math.min(repsDone + (isPlaying ? 1 : 0), ex?.repeatCount || 0)} / {ex?.repeatCount} reps\n          </div>\n\n          {/* measure grid with counts */}\n          <div className=\"flex flex-wrap justify-center items-start gap-x-3 gap-y-3 w-full\">\n            {ex?.beats.map((b, bi) => (\n              <div key={bi} className=\"flex flex-col items-center\">\n                <div className=\"flex gap-0.5\">\n                  {b.notes.map((n, ni) => {\n                    const on = isPlaying && bi === beatIdx && ni === noteIdx;\n                    const col = n.h === \"R\" ? C.R : C.L;\n                    return (\n                      <div key={ni} className=\"flex flex-col items-center\" style={{ width: 22 }}>\n                        <span className=\"w-5 h-5 rounded text-[11px] font-black flex items-center justify-center transition-all\"\n                          style={{ color: on ? C.bg : col, background: on ? col : \"transparent\", border: `1px solid ${on ? col : C.border}`, transform: on ? \"scale(1.15)\" : \"none\" }}>{n.h}</span>\n                        <span className=\"text-[8px] mt-0.5\" style={{ color: C.muted }}>{countFor(bi + 1, b.subdivision || b.notes.length)[ni]}</span>\n                      </div>\n                    );\n                  })}\n                </div>\n              </div>\n            ))}\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        <div className=\"flex justify-center gap-6 my-5 text-xs\">\n          <span className=\"flex items-center gap-2\"><span className=\"w-3 h-3 rounded\" style={{ background: C.R }} /> Right</span>\n          <span className=\"flex items-center gap-2\"><span className=\"w-3 h-3 rounded\" style={{ background: C.L }} /> Left</span>\n          <span className=\"flex items-center gap-2\"><span className=\"w-3 h-3 rounded border-2 border-dashed\" style={{ borderColor: C.mark }} /> buzz</span>\n        </div>\n        {goalReached && <div className=\"text-center text-sm mb-3\" style={{ color: C.L }}>Daily goal reached \u2014 keep going or finish up.</div>}\n\n        <div className=\"flex gap-3\">\n          <button onClick={isPlaying ? pause : play} className=\"flex-1 py-4 rounded-xl font-black text-lg active:scale-[0.99] transition\" style={{ background: C.R, color: C.bg }}>{isPlaying ? \"Pause\" : repsDone > 0 ? \"Resume\" : \"Play\"}</button>\n          <button onClick={skip} className=\"px-5 rounded-xl border font-semibold active:scale-[0.99] transition\" style={{ borderColor: C.border, background: C.panel, color: C.text }}>Done</button>\n          <button onClick={finish} className=\"px-5 rounded-xl border font-semibold active:scale-[0.99] transition\" style={{ borderColor: C.border, background: C.panel, color: C.muted }}>End</button>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n  );\n}\n\nfunction Sec({ label, children }) { return <div className=\"mb-6\"><div className=\"text-[11px] tracking-[0.25em] uppercase mb-3\" style={{ color: C.muted }}>{label}</div>{children}</div>; }\nfunction Row({ k, v }) { return <div className=\"flex justify-between py-1.5 text-sm\"><span style={{ color: C.muted }}>{k}</span><span className=\"font-mono\">{v}</span></div>; }\n",

      "json_block": "{\"language\": \"javascript\", \"code\": \"import React, { useState, useRef, useEffect, useCallback } from \\\"react\\\";\\n\\n/**\\n * DrumTrainerPro \\u2014 practices the grouped/subdivision/buzz model.\\n *\\n * Timing: each beat lasts 60/tempo sec; notes inside it are spaced\\n * beatDur/subdivision \\u2014 so 16ths(4), triplets(3), 8ths(2), single(1) all\\n * play correctly from the same data. Downbeats and accents click harder;\\n * buzz notes get a noise cue + dashed marker.\\n *\\n * Feed it the admin's exported JSON (Paste my JSON), or try the verified\\n * sample. Bad data will sound wrong \\u2014 that's a feature here.\\n */\\n\\nconst C = { bg: \\\"#14110F\\\", panel: \\\"#1F1A17\\\", border: \\\"#2E2825\\\", text: \\\"#EDE6DD\\\", muted: \\\"#8A7E73\\\", R: \\\"#E8A33D\\\", L: \\\"#4FB0A5\\\", mark: \\\"#EDE6DD\\\" };\\n\\nconst LEVELS = [\\n  { level: 1, label: \\\"Beginner\\\", tempo: 60 }, { level: 2, label: \\\"Developing\\\", tempo: 76 },\\n  { level: 3, label: \\\"Intermediate\\\", tempo: 92 }, { level: 4, label: \\\"Advanced\\\", tempo: 110 }, { level: 5, label: \\\"Expert\\\", tempo: 130 },\\n];\\nconst DAILY = [5, 10, 15, 20];\\n\\n// build sample exercises from the compact pattern grammar (>accent, z=buzz)\\nfunction parsePattern(p) {\\n  return p.split(\\\"|\\\").map((seg) => {\\n    const notes = [...seg.matchAll(/(>?)([RL])(z?)/gi)].map((m) => ({ h: m[2].toUpperCase(), accent: m[1] === \\\">\\\", art: m[3].toLowerCase() === \\\"z\\\" ? \\\"buzz\\\" : \\\"tap\\\" }));\\n    return { subdivision: notes.length, notes };\\n  }).filter((b) => b.notes.length);\\n}\\nconst mk = (name, p, reps) => ({ id: name, name, beats: parsePattern(p), repeatCount: reps });\\nconst SAMPLE = [\\n  mk(\\\"Straight 16ths\\\", \\\"RLRL|RLRL|RLRL|RLRL\\\", 8),\\n  mk(\\\"16ths into triplets\\\", \\\"RLRL|RRLL|RLR|LRL\\\", 8),\\n  mk(\\\"Accents + buzz roll\\\", \\\">RLRL|RRLL|RzLzRz|LzRzLz\\\", 6),\\n];\\n\\nconst fmt = (s) => `${Math.floor(s / 60)}:${String(Math.round(s % 60)).padStart(2, \\\"0\\\")}`;\\nconst exSeconds = (ex, tempo) => ex.beats.length * (60 / tempo) * ex.repeatCount;\\nconst countFor = (beatNo, sub) =>\\n  sub === 4 ? [String(beatNo), \\\"e\\\", \\\"&\\\", \\\"a\\\"] : sub === 3 ? [String(beatNo), \\\"trip\\\", \\\"let\\\"] : sub === 2 ? [String(beatNo), \\\"&\\\"] : sub === 1 ? [String(beatNo)] : [String(beatNo), ...Array(sub - 1).fill(\\\"\\u00b7\\\")];\\n\\nexport default function DrumTrainerPro() {\\n  const [screen, setScreen] = useState(\\\"setup\\\");\\n  const [level, setLevel] = useState(LEVELS[0]);\\n  const [dailyMin, setDailyMin] = useState(10);\\n  const [useSample, setUseSample] = useState(true);\\n  const [pasteText, setPasteText] = useState(\\\"\\\");\\n  const [setupErr, setSetupErr] = useState(\\\"\\\");\\n\\n  const [queue, setQueue] = useState([]);\\n  const [goalCount, setGoalCount] = useState(0);\\n  const [activeIdx, setActiveIdx] = useState(0);\\n  const [completed, setCompleted] = useState([]);\\n  const [isPlaying, setIsPlaying] = useState(false);\\n  const [beatIdx, setBeatIdx] = useState(0);\\n  const [noteIdx, setNoteIdx] = useState(0);\\n  const [repsDone, setRepsDone] = useState(0);\\n  const [sessionSec, setSessionSec] = useState(0);\\n\\n  const ctxRef = useRef(null), noiseRef = useRef(null);\\n  const sched = useRef(null), raf = useRef(null), sec = useRef(null);\\n  const nextT = useRef(0), exI = useRef(0), measR = useRef(0), beatR = useRef(0), noteR = useRef(0);\\n  const qRef = useRef([]), tempoRef = useRef(60), doneRef = useRef([]), noteQ = useRef([]);\\n\\n  const tempo = level.tempo;\\n\\n  const start = () => {\\n    let data = SAMPLE;\\n    if (!useSample) {\\n      try {\\n        const arr = JSON.parse(pasteText);\\n        if (!Array.isArray(arr) || !arr.length) throw new Error();\\n        data = arr.map((x) => ({ id: x.id, name: x.name, repeatCount: x.repeatCount || 8, beats: (x.beats || []).map((b) => ({ subdivision: b.subdivision || b.notes.length, notes: b.notes })) }));\\n      } catch { setSetupErr(\\\"That JSON didn't parse. Paste the admin's exported array.\\\"); return; }\\n    }\\n    const budget = dailyMin * 60;\\n    let acc = 0, fit = 0;\\n    for (const ex of data) { acc += exSeconds(ex, tempo); fit++; if (acc >= budget) break; }\\n    setQueue(data); qRef.current = data; setGoalCount(Math.max(1, Math.min(data.length, fit)));\\n    setActiveIdx(0); setCompleted([]); doneRef.current = []; setSessionSec(0); setRepsDone(0); setBeatIdx(0); setNoteIdx(0);\\n    exI.current = 0; measR.current = 0; beatR.current = 0; noteR.current = 0; noteQ.current = []; tempoRef.current = tempo;\\n    setSetupErr(\\\"\\\"); setScreen(\\\"session\\\");\\n  };\\n\\n  // ---- audio ----\\n  const ensureAudio = async () => {\\n    if (!ctxRef.current) {\\n      const ctx = new (window.AudioContext || window.webkitAudioContext)();\\n      ctxRef.current = ctx;\\n      const buf = ctx.createBuffer(1, ctx.sampleRate * 0.2, ctx.sampleRate);\\n      const d = buf.getChannelData(0);\\n      for (let i = 0; i < d.length; i++) d[i] = Math.random() * 2 - 1;\\n      noiseRef.current = buf;\\n    }\\n    await ctxRef.current.resume();\\n  };\\n  const tick = (time, freq, gain) => {\\n    const ctx = ctxRef.current, o = ctx.createOscillator(), g = ctx.createGain();\\n    o.frequency.value = freq; g.gain.setValueAtTime(gain, time); g.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.0001, time + 0.05);\\n    o.connect(g).connect(ctx.destination); o.start(time); o.stop(time + 0.06);\\n  };\\n  const buzz = (time) => {\\n    const ctx = ctxRef.current, s = ctx.createBufferSource(), g = ctx.createGain(), bp = ctx.createBiquadFilter();\\n    s.buffer = noiseRef.current; bp.type = \\\"bandpass\\\"; bp.frequency.value = 2500;\\n    g.gain.setValueAtTime(0.25, time); g.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.0001, time + 0.11);\\n    s.connect(bp).connect(g).connect(ctx.destination); s.start(time); s.stop(time + 0.12);\\n  };\\n  const playNote = (time, note, isDown, isBeat) => {\\n    if (note.art === \\\"buzz\\\") return buzz(time);\\n    if (note.accent) return tick(time, 1600, 0.5);\\n    if (isDown) return tick(time, 1200, 0.45);\\n    if (isBeat) return tick(time, 1000, 0.32);\\n    tick(time, 800, 0.18);\\n  };\\n\\n  const scheduler = useCallback(() => {\\n    const ctx = ctxRef.current;\\n    while (nextT.current < ctx.currentTime + 0.12) {\\n      const ex = qRef.current[exI.current];\\n      if (!ex) { finish(); return; }\\n      const beats = ex.beats, mb = beats.length, beat = beats[beatR.current];\\n      const sub = beat.subdivision || beat.notes.length, note = beat.notes[noteR.current];\\n      const beatDur = 60 / tempoRef.current, secPerNote = beatDur / sub;\\n      playNote(nextT.current, note, beatR.current === 0 && noteR.current === 0, noteR.current === 0);\\n      noteQ.current.push({ time: nextT.current, exIdx: exI.current, b: beatR.current, n: noteR.current, m: measR.current });\\n      nextT.current += secPerNote;\\n      if (++noteR.current >= sub) {\\n        noteR.current = 0;\\n        if (++beatR.current >= mb) {\\n          beatR.current = 0;\\n          if (++measR.current >= ex.repeatCount) {\\n            if (!doneRef.current.includes(exI.current)) { doneRef.current = [...doneRef.current, exI.current]; setCompleted([...doneRef.current]); }\\n            exI.current++; measR.current = 0;\\n          }\\n        }\\n      }\\n    }\\n  }, []);\\n\\n  const draw = useCallback(() => {\\n    const ctx = ctxRef.current;\\n    if (ctx) while (noteQ.current.length && noteQ.current[0].time <= ctx.currentTime) {\\n      const e = noteQ.current.shift(); setActiveIdx(e.exIdx); setBeatIdx(e.b); setNoteIdx(e.n); setRepsDone(e.m);\\n    }\\n    raf.current = requestAnimationFrame(draw);\\n  }, []);\\n\\n  const play = async () => {\\n    await ensureAudio();\\n    nextT.current = ctxRef.current.currentTime + 0.06;\\n    setIsPlaying(true);\\n    sched.current = setInterval(scheduler, 25);\\n    raf.current = requestAnimationFrame(draw);\\n    sec.current = setInterval(() => setSessionSec((s) => s + 1), 1000);\\n  };\\n  const pause = () => { setIsPlaying(false); clearInterval(sched.current); clearInterval(sec.current); cancelAnimationFrame(raf.current); noteQ.current = []; };\\n  const finish = () => { pause(); setScreen(\\\"summary\\\"); };\\n  const skip = () => {\\n    const i = exI.current;\\n    if (!doneRef.current.includes(i)) { doneRef.current = [...doneRef.current, i]; setCompleted([...doneRef.current]); }\\n    exI.current++; measR.current = 0; beatR.current = 0; noteR.current = 0; noteQ.current = [];\\n    if (exI.current >= qRef.current.length) finish();\\n  };\\n  useEffect(() => () => pause(), []);\\n\\n  // ---------- SETUP ----------\\n  if (screen === \\\"setup\\\") {\\n    return (\\n      <div className=\\\"min-h-screen flex justify-center font-sans\\\" style={{ background: C.bg, color: C.text }}>\\n        <div className=\\\"w-full max-w-[440px] px-5 py-8\\\">\\n          <div className=\\\"text-[11px] tracking-[0.3em] uppercase mb-1\\\" style={{ color: C.muted }}>Stick Control</div>\\n          <h1 className=\\\"text-3xl font-black tracking-tight mb-8\\\">Daily Practice</h1>\\n\\n          <Sec label=\\\"Level \\u2014 sets tempo\\\">\\n            <div className=\\\"space-y-2\\\">\\n              {LEVELS.map((l) => (\\n                <button key={l.level} onClick={() => setLevel(l)} className=\\\"w-full flex justify-between px-4 py-3 rounded-lg border text-left transition\\\"\\n                  style={{ borderColor: level.level === l.level ? C.R : C.border, background: level.level === l.level ? \\\"#241C12\\\" : C.panel }}>\\n                  <span className=\\\"font-semibold\\\">Level {l.level} \\u00b7 {l.label}</span><span className=\\\"font-mono\\\" style={{ color: C.R }}>{l.tempo} BPM</span>\\n                </button>\\n              ))}\\n            </div>\\n          </Sec>\\n\\n          <Sec label=\\\"Daily goal\\\">\\n            <div className=\\\"flex gap-2\\\">\\n              {DAILY.map((m) => (\\n                <button key={m} onClick={() => setDailyMin(m)} className=\\\"flex-1 py-3 rounded-lg border font-mono transition\\\"\\n                  style={{ borderColor: dailyMin === m ? C.L : C.border, background: dailyMin === m ? \\\"#15211F\\\" : C.panel, color: dailyMin === m ?          // fractional x of each of the 16 noteheads\nconst NOTE_Y = 0.388;              // fractional y of the staff line\nconst HAND = Array.from({length:16}, (_,i)=> i%2===0 ? \"R\" : \"L\");  // RLRL...\nconst COUNT = [\"1\",\"e\",\"&\",\"a\",\"2\",\"e\",\"&\",\"a\",\"3\",\"e\",\"&\",\"a\",\"4\",\"e\",\"&\",\"a\"];\n\nconst C = { bg:\"#14110F\", panel:\"#1F1A17\", border:\"#2E2825\", text:\"#EDE6DD\", muted:\"#8A7E73\", R:\"#E8A33D\", L:\"#4FB0A5\" };\nconst LEVELS = [[\"Beginner\",60],[\"Developing\",76],[\"Intermediate\",92],[\"Advanced\",110],[\"Expert\",130]];\n\nexport default function RudimentPlayer(){\n  const [tempo,setTempo] = useState(76);\n  const [repeats,setRepeats] = useState(20);\n  const [playing,setPlaying] = useState(false);\n  const [cur,setCur] = useState(-1);\n  const [reps,setReps] = useState(0);\n\n  const ctxRef=useRef(null), schedRef=useRef(null), rafRef=useRef(null);\n  const nextT=useRef(0), cntRef=useRef(0), qRef=useRef([]), tempoRef=useRef(76), totalRef=useRef(320);\n  useEffect(()=>{ tempoRef.current=tempo; },[tempo]);\n\n  const ensure = async ()=>{\n    if(!ctxRef.current) ctxRef.current = new (window.AudioContext||window.webkitAudioContext)();\n    await ctxRef.current.resume();\n  };\n  const click = (time,accent)=>{\n    const ctx=ctxRef.current, o=ctx.createOscillator(), g=ctx.createGain();\n    o.frequency.value = accent?1500:850; g.gain.setValueAtTime(accent?0.5:0.2,time);\n    g.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.0001,time+0.05);\n    o.connect(g).connect(ctx.destination); o.start(time); o.stop(time+0.06);\n  };\n  const scheduler = useCallback(()=>{\n    const ctx=ctxRef.current;\n    while(nextT.current < ctx.currentTime + 0.12){\n      if(cntRef.current>=totalRef.current){ finish(); return; }\n      const i=cntRef.current%16;\n      click(nextT.current, i%4===0);\n      qRef.current.push({time:nextT.current, c:cntRef.current});\n      nextT.current += (60/tempoRef.current)/4;     // 16th-note spacing\n      cntRef.current++;\n    }\n  },[]);\n  const draw = useCallback(()=>{\n    const ctx=ctxRef.current;\n    if(ctx) while(qRef.current.length && qRef.current[0].time<=ctx.currentTime){\n      const e=qRef.current.shift(); setCur(e.c%16); setReps(Math.floor(e.c/16));\n    }\n    rafRef.current=requestAnimationFrame(draw);\n  },[]);\n  const play = async ()=>{\n    await ensure();\n    totalRef.current = repeats*16;\n    if(cntRef.current>=totalRef.current){ cntRef.current=0; }\n    nextT.current = ctxRef.current.currentTime + 0.06;\n    setPlaying(true);\n    schedRef.current=setInterval(scheduler,25);\n    rafRef.current=requestAnimationFrame(draw);\n  };\n  const pause = ()=>{ setPlaying(false); clearInterval(schedRef.current); cancelAnimationFrame(rafRef.current); qRef.current=[]; };\n  const finish = ()=>{ pause(); setCur(-1); cntRef.current=0; setReps(repeats); };\n  const reset = ()=>{ pause(); cntRef.current=0; setCur(-1); setReps(0); };\n  useEffect(()=>()=>pause(),[]);\n\n  const hand = cur>=0 ? HAND[cur] : null;\n  const col = hand===\"R\"?C.R:C.L;\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"min-h-screen flex justify-center font-sans\" style={{background:C.bg,color:C.text}}>\n      <div className=\"w-full max-w-[640px] px-5 py-8\">\n        <div className=\"text-[11px] tracking-[0.3em] uppercase mb-1\" style={{color:C.muted}}>Stick Control \u00b7 p.5</div>\n        <h1 className=\"text-2xl font-black tracking-tight mb-6\">Exercise 1</h1>\n\n        {/* the real notation with the moving highlight */}\n        <div className=\"rounded-xl p-4 mb-2\" style={{background:\"#fff\"}}>\n          <div style={{position:\"relative\", width:\"100%\"}}>\n            <img src={EX1_IMG} alt=\"exercise 1\" style={{width:\"100%\", display:\"block\"}} draggable={false}/>\n            {cur>=0 && (\n              <div style={{\n                position:\"absolute\", left:(NOTE_X[cur]*100)+\"%\", top:(NOTE_Y*100)+\"%\",\n                width:\"5.5%\", paddingBottom:\"5.5%\", transform:\"translate(-50%,-50%)\",\n                borderRadius:\"50%\", background:col, opacity:0.45,\n                boxShadow:`0 0 0 2px ${col}`, transition:\"left 60ms linear\"\n              }}/>\n            )}\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        {/* count strip */}\n        <div className=\"flex justify-between px-1 mb-6 font-mono text-xs\" style={{color:C.muted}}>\n          {COUNT.map((c,i)=>(\n            <span key={i} style={{ color: cur===i ? col : (i%4===0?C.text:C.muted), fontWeight: cur===i?700:400 }}>{c}</span>\n          ))}\n        </div>\n\n        {/* big current hand + reps */}\n        <div className=\"flex items-center justify-center gap-6 mb-6\">\n          <div className=\"w-20 h-24 rounded-2xl flex */}\n        <div className=\"rounded-xl border p-4 mb-4\" style={{borderColor:C.border, background:C.panel}}>\n          <div className=\"flex justify-between mb-2 text-xs uppercase tracking-wider\" style={{color:C.muted}}>\n            <span>Tempo</span><span className=\"font-mono\" style={{color:C.text}}>{tempo} BPM</span>\n          </div>\n          <input type=\"range\" min={40} max={200} },[tempo]);\\n\\n  const ensure = async ()=>{\\n    if(!ctxRef.current) ctxRef.current = new (window.AudioContext||window.webkitAudioContext)();\\n    await ctxRef.current.resume();\\n  };\\n  const click = (time,accent)=>{\\n    const ctx=ctxRef.current, o=ctx.createOscillator(), g=ctx.createGain();\\n    o.frequency.value = accent?1500:850; g.gain.setValueAtTime(accent?0.5:0.2,time);\\n    g.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.0001,time+0.05);\\n    o.connect(g).connect(ctx.destination); o.start(time); o.stop(time+0.06);\\n  };\\n  const scheduler = useCallback(()=>{\\n    const ctx=ctxRef.current;\\n    while(nextT.current < ctx.currentTime + 0.12){\\n      if(cntRef.current>=totalRef.current){ finish(); return; }\\n      const i=cntRef.current%16;\\n      click(nextT.current, i%4===0);\\n      qRef.current.push({time:nextT.current, c:cntRef.current});\\n      nextT.current += (60/tempoRef.current)/4;     // 16th-note spacing\\n      cntRef.current++;\\n    }\\n  },[]);\\n  const draw = useCallback(()=>{\\n    const ctx=ctxRef.current;\\n    if(ctx) while(qRef.current.length && qRef.current[0].time<=ctx.currentTime){\\n      const e=qRef.current.shift(); setCur(e.c%16); setReps(Math.floor(e.c/16));\\n    }\\n    rafRef.current=requestAnimationFrame(draw);\\n  },[]);\\n  const play = async ()=>{\\n    await ensure();\\n    totalRef.current = repeats*16;\\n    if(cntRef.current>=totalRef.current){ cntRef.current=0; }\\n    nextT.current = ctxRef.current.currentTime + 0.06;\\n    setPlaying(true);\\n    schedRef.current=setInterval(scheduler,25);\\n    rafRef.current=requestAnimationFrame(draw);\\n  };\\n  const pause = ()=>{ setPlaying(false); clearInterval(schedRef.current); cancelAnimationFrame(rafRef.current); qRef.current=[]; };\\n  const finish = ()=>{ pause(); setCur(-1); cntRef.current=0; setReps(repeats); };\\n  const reset = ()=>{ pause(); cntRef.current=0; setCur(-1); setReps(0); };\\n  useEffect(()=>()=>pause(),[]);\\n\\n  const hand = cur>=0 ? HAND[cur] : null;\\n  const col = hand===\\\"R\\\"?C.R:C.L;\\n\\n  return (\\n    <div className=\\\"min-h-screen flex justify-center font-sans\\\" style={{background:C.bg,color:C.text}}>\\n      <div className=\\\"w-full max-w-[640px] px-5 py-8\\\">\\n        <div className=\\\"text-[11px] tracking-[0.3em] uppercase mb-1\\\" style={{color:C.muted}}>Stick Control \\u00b7 p.5</div>\\n        <h1 className=\\\"text-2xl font-black tracking-tight mb-6\\\">Exercise 1</h1>\\n\\n        {/* the real notation with the moving highlight */}\\n        <div className=\\\"rounded-xl p-4 mb-2\\\" style={{background:\\\"#fff\\\"}}>\\n          <div style={{position:\\\"relative\\\", width:\\\"100%\\\"}}>\\n            <img src={EX1_IMG} alt=\\\"exercise 1\\\" style={{width:\\\"100%\\\", */}\\n        <div className=\\\"flex justify-between px-1 mb-6 font-mono text-xs\\\" style={{color:C.muted}}>\\n          {COUNT.map((c,i)=>(\\n            <span key={i} style={{ color: cur===i ? col const [repeats,setRepeats]=useState(20);\n  const [playing,setPlaying]=useState(false);\n  const [cur,setCur]=useState(-1);\n  const [reps,setReps]=useState(0);\n\n  const ctxRef=useRef(null), repRef=useRef(20);\n  useEffect(()=>{tempoRef.current=tempo;},[tempo]);\n  useEffect(()=>{repRef.current=repeats;},[repeats]);\n\n  const ex = EXERCISES[exIdx];\n  const flat = flatten(ex);\n  const cn = cur>=0 ? flat[cur] : null;\n  const col = cn ? (cn.h===\"R\"?C.R:C.L) : C.muted;\n\n  const ensure=async()=>{ if(!ctxRef.current) ctxRef.current=new (window.AudioContext||window.webkitAudioContext)(); await ctxRef.current.resume(); };\n  const click=(t,accent)=>{const c=ctxRef.current,o=c.createOscillator(),g=c.createGain();o.frequency.value=accent?1500:850;g.gain.setValueAtTime(accent?0.5:0.2,t);g.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.0001,t+0.05);o.connect(g).connect(c.destination);o.start(t);o.stop(t+0.06);};\n\n  const scheduler=useCallback(()=>{\n    const c=ctxRef.current, F=flatRef.current;\n    while(nextT.current < c.currentTime + 0.12){\n      const note=F[idxRef.current];\n      click(nextT.current, note.beatStart);\n      qRef.current.push({time:nextT.current, idx:idxRef.current});\n      nextT.current += (1/note.sub)*(60/tempoRef.current);   // exact onset spacing\n      idxRef.current++;\n      if(idxRef.current>=F.length){\n        idxRef.current=0; measRef.current++;\n        if(measRef.current>=repRef.current){ finish(); return; }\n      }\n    }\n  },[]);\n  const draw=useCallback(()=>{\n    const c=ctxRef.current;\n    if(c) while(qRef.current.length && qRef.current[0].time<=c.currentTime){ const e=qRef.current.shift(); setCur(e.idx); setReps(measRef.current); }\n    rafRef.current=requestAnimationFrame(draw);\n  },[]);\n  const play=async()=>{ await ensure(); flatRef.current=flatten(EXERCISES[exIdx]); nextT.current=ctxRef.current.currentTime+0.06; Switch between **16ths** and **Triplets** at the top.\n\nThe triplet tab is the real test, and it proves the architecture you asked for: the positions come from the actual book noteheads (the verified R L R \u00b7 L R L groups), while the *timing* comes purely from the subdivision \u2014 `sub: 3` means each note is spaced `beat \u00f7 3`. Flip between the two tabs at the same tempo and you'll hear and see it: the triplets sit evenly and distinctly from the even 16ths, highlight snapping dead-on each onset. That's WHEN (from the model) and WHERE (from the image) staying cleanly separate.\n\nThe honest limit, restated because it'll shape the build: I could only reliably pull positions for those two triplet groups. The *full* page-14 ex1 is a dense two-measure line (sixteenths \u2192 eighths \u2192 triplets, ~20 notes), and at this scan resolution the detector kept missing the group by the clef and miscounting. So whole-page position extraction isn't production-ready on scans this size.\n\nThe fix isn't more pixel-tuning \u2014 it's a cleaner source. Two good options: feed in **higher-resolution page images** (or even a zoomed phone photo of a single exercise), or have the **vision read return note bounding boxes** alongside the sticking, so positions come from the same call that already reads the rhythm. Either makes \"load any exercise, highlight every note\" reliable.\n\nSo: do you want to **get clean positions working** (send a higher-res page-14 or a tight shot of exercise 1, and I'll run the full line end to end), or take this proven engine and **wire it into the app** as the practice screen? And given how much is now settled \u2014 the snap-timing player, the WHEN/WHERE split, the data model \u2014 saying **export** would capture all of it in the `PROJECT.md` for Claude Code.",
